papers.title: Aegaeon: Effective GPU Pooling for Concurrent LLM Serving on the Market.
papers.abstract:
Model markets ( e.g. , Hugging Face) feature a wide variety of models with unique characteristics and varying levels of popularity. Serving sporadic and unpredictable requests in concurrent inference workloads with dedicated GPU instances results in substantial resource waste. While existing multi-model serving solutions use GPU pooling and server-less computing to improve resource efficiency, their effective-ness is limited to supporting at most two or three models per GPU, which is inadequate for fully utilizing GPU resources.

We propose Aegaeon, a multi-model serving system that performs model auto-scaling at the token granularity to achieve effective GPU pooling. Aegaeon schedules multimodel requests and makes auto-scaling decisions on a per-token basis to maximize service quality. It reduces auto-scaling overhead by 97% through component reuse, explicit memory management, and fine-grained KV cache synchronization. Experiments show that Aegaeon sustains 2–2.5× higher request arrival rates or 1.5–9× more goodput compared to existing solutions. Aegaeon has been beta deployed in our model marketplace and currently serves tens of models. Deployment results show that Aegaeon reduces the number of GPUs required for serving these models from 1,192 to 213, highlighting an 82% GPU resource saving.
papers.abstract_zh:
模特市场（例如，Hugging Face）拥有各种各样的模特，这些模特具有独特的特征和不同的受欢迎程度。使用专用 GPU 实例在并发推理工作负载中处理零星且不可预测的请求会导致大量资源浪费。现有的多模型服务解决方案虽然利用GPU池化和无服务器计算来提高资源效率，但其有效性仅限于每个GPU最多支持两个或三个模型，这不足以充分利用GPU资源。

我们提出了 Aegaeon，一种多模型服务系统，可以在 token 粒度上执行模型自动缩放，以实现有效的 GPU 池化。 Aegaeon 安排多模型请求并根据每个令牌做出自动扩展决策，以最大限度地提高服务质量。它通过组件重用、显式内存管理和细粒度 KV 缓存同步，将自动扩展开销减少了 97%。实验表明，与现有解决方案相比，Aegaeon 的请求到达率提高了 2-2.5 倍，吞吐量提高了 1.5-9 倍。 Aegaeon 已在我们的模型市场中进行测试部署，目前为数十种模型提供服务。部署结果显示，Aegaeon 将服务这些模型所需的 GPU 数量从 1,192 个减少到 213 个，显着节省了 82% 的 GPU 资源。

papers.title: Aeolia: A Fast and Secure Userspace Interrupt-Based Storage Stack.
papers.abstract:
Polling-based userspace storage stacks achieve great I/O performance. However, they cannot efficiently and securely share disks and CPUs among multiple tasks. In contrast, interrupt-based kernel stacks inherently suffer from subpar I/O performance but achieve advantages in resource sharing.

We present Aeolia, a novel storage stack that achieves great I/O performance while offering efficient and secure resource sharing. Aeolia is an interrupt-based userspace storage stack, representing a new point in the design space previously considered unfeasible. Our main observation is that, contrary to conventional wisdom, polling offers only marginal disk performance improvements over interrupts. Aeolia exploits user interrupt, an emerging hardware feature commonly used for userspace IPIs, in a novel way to deliver storage interrupts directly to userspace, thereby achieving high I/O performance with direct access. Aeolia leverages the hardware intra-process isolation features and sched_ext, an eBPF-based userspace scheduling framework, to efficiently and securely share CPUs and disks among multiple tasks, challenging the common belief that these are inherent disadvantages of userspace storage stacks. The above design enables Aeolia to realize AeoFS, a high-performance library file system that securely and directly accesses disks. Our evaluation shows that Aeolia outperforms Linux by 2× and AeoFS outperforms ext4 by up to 19.1×, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于轮询的用户空间存储堆栈实现了出色的 I/O 性能。但是，它们无法在多个任务之间高效、安全地共享磁盘和 CPU。相比之下，基于中断的内核堆栈本质上会受到 I/O 性能不佳的影响，但在资源共享方面具有优势。

我们推出 Aeolia，一种新颖的存储堆栈，可实现出色的 I/O 性能，同时提供高效、安全的资源共享。 Aeolia 是一个基于中断的用户空间存储堆栈，代表了以前认为不可行的设计空间中的一个新点。我们的主要观察结果是，与传统观点相反，轮询仅比中断提供了边际的磁盘性能改进。 Aeolia 利用用户中断（一种常用于用户空间 IPI 的新兴硬件功能）以一种新颖的方式将存储中断直接传递到用户空间，从而通过直接访问实现高 I/O 性能。 Aeolia 利用硬件进程内隔离功能和基于 eBPF 的用户空间调度框架 sched_ext 在多个任务之间高效、安全地共享 CPU 和磁盘，挑战了人们普遍认为这些是用户空间存储堆栈固有缺点的观点。上述设计使Aeolia能够实现AeoFS这一安全、直接访问磁盘的高性能库文件系统。我们的评估表明，Aeolia 的性能优于 Linux 2 倍，AeoFS 的性能优于 ext4 高达 19.1 倍。

papers.title: Analyzing and Enhancing ArckFS: An Anecdotal Example of Benefits of Artifact Evaluation.
papers.abstract:
We analyze and enhance Trio and ArckFS by Zhou et al. (SOSP 2023), high-performance NVM file system architecture and file system. A group of authors from KAIST initiated this study through a careful review of the paper and the released artifact, seeking to enhance the Trio work. Their analysis identifies (1) insufficient clarity in the paper on the handling of multi-inode operations, and (2) several implementation bugs in ArckFS that cause occasional operation failures or potential crash inconsistencies during inode creation.

Through close collaboration between the KAIST and Trio authors, we have enhanced the Trio work. (1) We clarify a few relevant rules for ArckFS to handle multi-inode operations. (2) We develop patches for the identified bugs, which essentially maintain the performance claims made in the Trio paper. Our study highlights the crucial role of artifact evaluation in systems research and its potential benefits.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们分析并增强了 Zhou 等人的 Trio 和 AckFS。 (SOSP 2023)，高性能NVM文件系统架构和文件系统。 KAIST 的一组作者通过仔细审查论文和已发布的工件发起了这项研究，旨在增强 Trio 的工作。他们的分析发现：(1) 论文中关于处理多 inode 操作的清晰度不够，以及 (2) ArckFS 中的几个实现错误导致 inode 创建过程中偶尔出现操作失败或潜在的崩溃不一致。

通过 KAIST 和 Trio 作者之间的密切合作，我们增强了 Trio 的工作。 (1)我们澄清了AckFS处理多inode操作的一些相关规则。 (2) 我们针对已识别的错误开发补丁，这基本上维持了 Trio 论文中提出的性能声明。我们的研究强调了工件评估在系统研究中的关键作用及其潜在好处。

papers.title: Atmosphere: Practical Verified Kernels with Rust and Verus.
papers.abstract:
Recent advances in programming languages and automated formal reasoning have changed the balance between the complexity and practicality of developing formally verified systems. Our work leverages Verus, a new verifier for Rust that combines ideas of linear types, permissioned reasoning, and automated verification based on satisfiability modulo theories (SMT), for the development of a formally verified microkernel, Atmosphere.

Atmosphere is a full-featured microkernel with support for strict isolation in mixed-criticality systems. We develop all code in Rust and prove its functional correctness, i.e., refinement of a high-level specification, with Verus. Development and verification of 6K lines of executable code required an effort of less than 2.5 person-years (only 1.5 years were spent on verification, another person-year was spent developing non-verified parts of the system). On average, our code has a proof-to-code ratio of 3.32:1 and completes verification in less than 20 seconds on a modern laptop, which we argue is practical for the development of verified systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
编程语言和自动形式推理的最新进展改变了开发形式验证系统的复杂性和实用性之间的平衡。我们的工作利用 Verus，一种新的 Rust 验证器，它结合了线性类型、许可推理和基于可满足性模理论 (SMT) 的自动验证的思想，用于开发正式验证的微内核 Atmosphere。

Atmosphere 是一个功能齐全的微内核，支持混合关键性系统中的严格隔离。我们用 Rust 开发所有代码，并使用 Verus 证明其功能正确性，即高级规范的细化。 6K行可执行代码的开发和验证需要不到2.5人年的工作量（仅1.5人年用于验证，另外一个人年用于开发系统的未验证部分）。平均而言，我们的代码的证明与代码比率为 3.32:1，并且在现代笔记本电脑上在不到 20 秒的时间内完成验证，我们认为这对于开发经过验证的系统是实用的。

papers.title: AutoMan: Facilitating Verified Distributed Systems Development Through Automatic Code Generation and Manual Optimizations.
papers.abstract: Developing correct and performant distributed systems is notoriously challenging due to their complexity and scale. There are two main approaches to addressing correctness issues that stem from their complexity: (i) formal verification , and (ii) automatic compilation of specifications to implementations. The former provides machine-checked correctness guarantees along with good performance but requires substantial expert effort. In contrast, the latter can reduce developer effort, though often at the expense of rigorous correctness guarantees. In this paper, we design, develop, and evaluate the AutoMan workflow, which makes developing distributed systems with refinement-based formal verification techniques more accessible and practical for both experts and developers. AutoMan achieves this by automatically generating implementations and their corresponding verification obligations from formal system specifications. This is accomplished without placing trust in the code generator and without sacrificing end-to-end correctness or performance. AutoMan's use of refinement-based verification methodology for ensuring soundness allows hand-tuned performance-critical code and automatically generated code to harmoniously co-exist without jeopardizing end-to-end correctness guarantees. The effectiveness of AutoMan is demonstrated through the reimplementation of Multi-Paxos, PBFT, a sharded Key-Value store, and CausalMesh following the AutoMan methodology. In all cases, the use of AutoMan substantially reduced development effort (e.g., 70%-97% for Multi-Paxos), while the resulting systems maintained robust efficiency and correctness.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其复杂性和规模，开发正确且高性能的分布式系统是众所周知的挑战。有两种主要方法可以解决源于其复杂性的正确性问题：（i）形式验证，以及（ii）将规范自动编译为实现。前者提供机器检查的正确性保证以及良好的性能，但需要大量的专家努力。相比之下，后者可以减少开发人员的工作量，尽管通常会牺牲严格的正确性保证。在本文中，我们设计、开发和评估 AutoMan 工作流程，这使得专家和开发人员都更容易使用基于细化的形式验证技术来开发分布式系统。 AutoMan 通过根据正式系统规范自动生成实现及其相应的验证义务来实现这一目标。这是在不信任代码生成器的情况下完成的，也不会牺牲端到端的正确性或性能。 AutoMan 使用基于细化的验证方法来确保可靠性，允许手动调整的性能关键代码和自动生成的代码和谐共存，而不会危及端到端的正确性保证。 AutoMan 的有效性是通过遵循 AutoMan 方法论重新实现 Multi-Paxos、PBFT、分片键值存储和 CausalMesh 来证明的。在所有情况下，AutoMan 的使用都大大减少了开发工作量（例如，Multi-Paxos 减少了 70%-97%），而最终的系统保持了稳健的效率和正确性。

papers.title: cache_ext: Customizing the Page Cache with eBPF.
papers.abstract: The OS page cache is central to the performance of many applications, by reducing excessive accesses to storage. However, its one-size-fits-all eviction policy performs poorly in many workloads. While the systems community has experimented with a plethora of new and adaptive eviction policies in non-OS settings (e.g., key-value stores, CDNs), it is very difficult to implement such policies in the page cache, due to the complexity of modifying kernel code. To address these shortcomings, we design a flexible eBPF-based framework for the Linux page cache, called cache_ext, that allows developers to customize the page cache without modifying the kernel. cache_ext enables applications to customize the page cache policy for their specific needs, while also ensuring that different applications' policies do not interfere with each other and preserving the page cache's ability to share memory across different processes. We demonstrate the flexibility of cache_ext's interface by using it to implement eight different policies, including sophisticated eviction algorithms. Our evaluation shows that it is indeed beneficial for applications to customize the page cache to match their workloads' unique properties, and that they can achieve up to 70% higher throughput and 58% lower tail latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 操作系统页面缓存通过减少对存储的过度访问而成为许多应用程序性能的核心。然而，其一刀切的驱逐策略在许多工作负载中表现不佳。虽然系统社区在非操作系统设置（例如键值存储、CDN）中尝试了大量新的自适应逐出策略，但由于修改内核代码的复杂性，在页面缓存中实现此类策略非常困难。为了解决这些缺点，我们为Linux页面缓存设计了一个灵活的基于eBPF的框架，称为cache_ext，它允许开发人员在不修改内核的情况下自定义页面缓存。 cache_ext 使应用程序能够根据其特定需求自定义页面缓存策略，同时还确保不同应用程序的策略不会相互干扰，并保留页面缓存在不同进程之间共享内存的能力。我们通过使用它来实现八种不同的策略（包括复杂的逐出算法）来展示cache_ext接口的灵活性。我们的评估表明，应用程序自定义页面缓存以匹配其工作负载的独特属性确实是有益的，并且它们可以实现高达 70% 的吞吐量提高和 58% 的尾部延迟降低。

papers.title: Characterizing Mobile SoC for Accelerating Heterogeneous LLM Inference.
papers.abstract:
With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence technologies such as ChatGPT, AI agents, and video generation, contemporary mobile systems have begun integrating these AI capabilities on local devices to enhance privacy and reduce response latency. To meet the computational demands of AI tasks, current mobile SoCs are equipped with diverse AI accelerators, including GPUs and Neural Processing Units (NPUs). However, there has not been a comprehensive characterization of these heterogeneous processors, and existing designs typically only leverage a single AI accelerator for LLM inference, leading to suboptimal use of computational resources and memory bandwidth.

In this paper, we first summarize key performance characteristics of heterogeneous processors, SoC memory bandwidth, etc. Drawing on these observations, we propose different heterogeneous parallel mechanisms to fully exploit both GPU and NPU computational power and memory bandwidth. We further design a fast synchronization mechanism between heterogeneous processors that leverages the unified memory architecture. By employing these techniques, we present HeteroInfer, the fastest LLM inference engine in mobile devices which supports GPU-NPU heterogeneous execution. Evaluation shows that HeteroInfer delivers a 1.34× to 6.02× end-to-end speedup over state-of-the-art GPU-only and NPU-only LLM engines, while maintaining negligible interference with other applications.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着ChatGPT、AI代理和视频生成等人工智能技术的快速发展，当代移动系统已经开始将这些AI功能集成到本地设备上，以增强隐私并减少响应延迟。为了满足AI任务的计算需求，当前的移动SoC配备了多种AI加速器，包括GPU和神经处理单元（NPU）。然而，这些异构处理器尚未得到全面的表征，并且现有设计通常仅利用单个 AI 加速器进行 LLM 推理，导致计算资源和内存带宽的使用不理想。

在本文中，我们首先总结了异构处理器、SoC 内存带宽等关键性能特征。根据这些观察结果，我们提出了不同的异构并行机制，以充分利用 GPU 和 NPU 的计算能力和内存带宽。我们进一步设计了一种利用统一内存架构的异构处理器之间的快速同步机制。通过采用这些技术，我们推出了 HeteroInfer，这是移动设备中最快的 LLM 推理引擎，支持 GPU-NPU 异构执行。评估表明，HeteroInfer 比最先进的仅 GPU 和仅 NPU LLM 引擎提供 1.34 倍至 6.02 倍的端到端加速，同时保持对其他应用程序的干扰可以忽略不计。

papers.title: CHERIoT RTOS: An OS for Fine-Grained Memory-Safe Compartments on Low-Cost Embedded Devices.
papers.abstract:
Embedded systems do not benefit from strong memory protection, because they are designed to minimize cost. At the same time, there is increasing pressure to connect embedded devices to the internet, where their vulnerable nature makes them routinely subject to compromise. This fundamental tension leads to the current status-quo where exploitable devices put individuals and critical infrastructure at risk.

We present the design of a dependable embedded OS where compartmentalization and memory safety are first-class citizens. We co-design the OS with an embedded hardware platform that implements CHERI capabilities at a similar cost profile to existing chips with minimal security. We demonstrate key design benefits: fine-grained fault-tolerant compartments, OS-level support for compartment-interface hardening, and auditing facilities to thwart supply-chain attacks, among others, and show that they come at a memory usage and performance cost that allows their widespread deployment in cheap, resource-constrained devices.
papers.abstract_zh:
嵌入式系统无法从强大的内存保护中受益，因为它们的设计目的是最大限度地降低成本。与此同时，将嵌入式设备连接到互联网的压力越来越大，它们的脆弱性使它们经常受到损害。这种根本性的紧张局势导致了当前的现状，可利用的设备使个人和关键基础设施面临风险。

我们提出了可靠的嵌入式操作系统的设计，其中分区和内存安全是一流的。我们与嵌入式硬件平台共同设计操作系统，该平台以与现有芯片相似的成本配置实现 CHERI 功能，且安全性最低。我们展示了关键的设计优势：细粒度的容错隔间、对隔间接口强化的操作系统级支持以及阻止供应链攻击的审核设施等，并表明它们的内存使用和性能成本允许它们在廉价、资源受限的设备中广泛部署。

papers.title: COpter: Efficient Large-Scale Resource-Allocation via Continual Optimization.
papers.abstract: Optimization-based resource allocation in large-scale systems often must trade-off responsiveness and allocation quality. Generally, allocations are reconsidered every few minutes (a round ) by formulating and solving a new optimization problem. This paper introduces continual optimization , which reframes round-based resource allocation as a sequence of interconnected problems, leveraging the observation that these resource allocation problems often only change by small amounts across successive rounds to reduce solving times. COpter provides a method for continual optimization of Linear Programs (LP) and Mixed Integer Linear Programs (MILP) formulations of resource allocation problems by combining three innovations: (1) an efficient-to-update problem representation for incremental changes, (2) a proximal-point method implementation that can provably benefit from prior computational effort and allocations, and (3) lightweight heuristics for mixed-integer problems that recover feasible integer solutions with negligible quality loss. We evaluate COpter on problems in three domains: GPU cluster scheduling, shard load balancing, and WAN traffic engineering. Overall, we find that COpter finds high-quality solutions while reducing solver runtimes by 57–83× compared to state-of-the-art commercial solvers. Compared to problem partitioning approaches (POP), COpter simultaneously improves allocation quality and reduces end-to-end allocator runtimes by 1.5–30×.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型系统中基于优化的资源分配通常必须权衡响应能力和分配质量。一般来说，每隔几分钟（一轮）就会通过制定和解决新的优化问题来重新考虑分配。本文介绍了持续优化，它将基于轮次的资源分配重新构建为一系列相互关联的问题，利用这些资源分配问题通常在连续轮次中仅发生少量变化的观察结果来减少求解时间。 COpter 通过结合三项创新，提供了一种持续优化资源分配问题的线性规划 (LP) 和混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 公式的方法：(1) 针对增量变化的高效更新问题表示，(2) 可以证明从先前的计算工作和分配中受益的近点方法实现，以及 (3) 针对混合整数问题的轻量级启发式方法，可以在质量损失可忽略不计的情况下恢复可行的整数解。我们针对三个领域的问题评估 COpter：GPU 集群调度、分片负载均衡和 WAN 流量工程。总的来说，我们发现 COpter 找到了高质量的解决方案，同时与最先进的商业求解器相比，求解器运行时间减少了 57-83 倍。与问题划分方法 (POP) 相比，COpter 同时提高了分配质量，并将端到端分配器运行时间缩短了 1.5-30 倍。

papers.title: CortenMM: Efficient Memory Management with Strong Correctness Guarantees.
papers.abstract:
Modern memory management systems suffer from poor performance and subtle concurrency bugs, slowing down applications while introducing security vulnerabilities. We observe that both issues stem from the conventional design of memory management systems with two levels of abstraction: a software-level abstraction ( e.g. , VMA trees in Linux) and a hardware-level abstraction (typically, page tables). This design increases portability but requires correctly and efficiently synchronizing two drastically different and complex data structures, which is generally challenging.

We present CortenMM, a memory management system with a clean-slate design to achieve both high performance and synchronization correctness. Our key insight is that most OSes no longer need the software-level abstraction, since mainstream ISAs use nearly identical hardware MMU formats. Therefore, departing from prior designs, CortenMM eliminates the software-level abstraction to achieve sweeping simplicity. Exploiting this simplicity, CortenMM proposes a transactional interface with scalable locking protocols to program the MMU, achieving high performance by avoiding the extra contention in the software-level abstraction. The one-level design further enables us to formally verify the correctness of concurrent code operating on the MMU (correctness of basic operations and locking protocols), thereby offering strong correctness guarantees. Our evaluation shows that the formally verified CortenMM outperforms Linux by 1.2× to 26× on real-world applications.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代内存管理系统存在性能差和微妙的并发错误，降低了应用程序的速度，同时引入了安全漏洞。我们观察到这两个问题都源于具有两个抽象级别的内存管理系统的传统设计：软件级抽象（例如 Linux 中的 VMA 树）和硬件级抽象（通常是页表）。这种设计提高了可移植性，但需要正确有效地同步两个截然不同且复杂的数据结构，这通常具有挑战性。

我们推出 CortenMM，这是一种采用全新设计的内存管理系统，可实现高性能和同步正确性。我们的主要见解是，大多数操作系统不再需要软件级抽象，因为主流 ISA 使用几乎相同的硬件 MMU 格式。因此，与之前的设计不同，CortenMM 消除了软件级抽象，以实现彻底的简单性。利用这种简单性，CortenMM 提出了一种具有可扩展锁定协议的事务接口来对 MMU 进行编程，通过避免软件级抽象中的额外争用来实现高性能。一级设计进一步使我们能够形式化地验证在MMU上运行的并发代码的正确性（基本操作和锁定协议的正确性），从而提供强有力的正确性保证。我们的评估表明，经过正式验证的 CortenMM 在实际应用中的性能优于 Linux 1.2 倍到 26 倍。

papers.title: Coyote v2: Raising the Level of Abstraction for Data Center FPGAs.
papers.abstract: In the trend towards hardware specialization, FPGAs play a dual role as accelerators for offloading, e.g., network virtualization, and as a vehicle for prototyping and exploring hardware designs. While FPGAs offer versatility and performance, integrating them in larger systems remains challenging. Thus, recent efforts have focused on raising the level of abstraction through better interfaces and high-level programming languages. Yet, there is still quite some room for improvement. In this paper, we present Coyote v2, an open-source FPGA shell built with a novel, three-layer hierarchical design supporting dynamic partial reconfiguration of services and user logic, with a unified logic interface, and high-level software abstractions which facilitate application deployment, multi-tenancy and transparent workload pipelining. Experimental results indicate Coyote v2 reduces synthesis times between 15% and 20% and run-time reconfiguration times by an order of magnitude, when compared to existing systems. We also demonstrate the advantages of Coyote v2 by deploying several realistic applications, including HyperLogLog cardinality estimation, AES encryption, and neural network inference. Finally, Coyote v2 places a great deal of emphasis on integration with real systems through reusable and reconfigurable services, including a fully RoCE v2-compliant networking stack, a shared virtual memory model with the host, and a DMA engine between FPGAs and GPUs. We demonstrate these features by, e.g., seamlessly deploying an FPGA-accelerated neural network from Python.
papers.abstract_zh: 在硬件专业化的趋势中，FPGA 发挥着双重作用：作为卸载（例如网络虚拟化）的加速器，以及作为原型设计和探索硬件设计的工具。虽然 FPGA 提供了多功能性和性能，但将它们集成到更大的系统中仍然具有挑战性。因此，最近的努力集中在通过更好的接口和高级编程语言来提高抽象级别。然而，仍有相当大的改进空间。在本文中，我们介绍了 Coyote v2，这是一种开源 FPGA shell，采用新颖的三层分层设计构建，支持服务和用户逻辑的动态部分重新配置，具有统一的逻辑接口和高级软件抽象，有助于应用程序部署、多租户和透明的工作负载流水线。实验结果表明，与现有系统相比，Coyote v2 将综合时间减少了 15% 至 20%，并将运行时重新配置时间减少了一个数量级。我们还通过部署几个实际应用程序来展示 Coyote v2 的优势，包括 HyperLogLog 基数估计、AES 加密和神经网络推理。最后，Coyote v2 非常重视通过可重用和可重新配置的服务与真实系统集成，包括完全符合 RoCE v2 的网络堆栈、与主机共享的虚拟内存模型以及 FPGA 和 GPU 之间的 DMA 引擎。我们通过从 Python 无缝部署 FPGA 加速神经网络等方式来演示这些功能。

papers.title: DCP: Addressing Input Dynamism In Long-Context Training via Dynamic Context Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Context parallelism has emerged as a key technique to support long-context training, a growing trend in generative AI for modern large models. However, existing context parallel methods rely on static parallelization configurations that overlook the dynamic nature of training data, specifically, the variability in sequence lengths and token relationships (i.e., attention patterns) across samples. As a result, these methods often suffer from unnecessary communication overhead and imbalanced computation. In this paper, we present DCP, a dynamic context parallel training framework that introduces fine-grained blockwise partitioning of both data and computation. By enabling flexible mapping of data and computation blocks to devices, DCP can adapt to varying sequence characteristics, effectively reducing communication and improving memory and computation balance. Micro-benchmarks demonstrate that DCP accelerates attention by 1.19x~2.45x under causal masks and 2.15x~3.77x under sparse attention patterns. Additionally, we observe up to 0.94x~1.16x end-to-end training speed-up for causal masks, and 1.00x~1.46x for sparse masks.
papers.abstract_zh: 上下文并行性已成为支持长上下文训练的关键技术，长上下文训练是现代大型模型的生成人工智能的增长趋势。然而，现有的上下文并行方法依赖于静态并行化配置，忽略了训练数据的动态性质，特别是样本之间序列长度和标记关系（即注意力模式）的可变性。因此，这些方法经常遭受不必要的通信开销和不平衡的计算。在本文中，我们提出了 DCP，一种动态上下文并行训练框架，它引入了数据和计算的细粒度分块分区。通过实现数据和计算块到设备的灵活映射，DCP可以适应不同的序列特征，有效减少通信并改善内存和计算平衡。微基准测试表明，DCP 在因果掩模下将注意力加速了 1.19 倍~2.45 倍，在稀疏注意力模式下加速了 2.15 倍~3.77 倍。此外，我们观察到因果掩码的端到端训练加速高达 0.94 倍~1.16 倍，稀疏掩码的端到端训练加速为 1.00 倍~1.46 倍。

papers.title: Demeter: A Scalable and Elastic Tiered Memory Solution for Virtualized Cloud via Guest Delegation.
papers.abstract: Memory scalability has emerged as a critical bottleneck in virtualized cloud environments. Tiered memory architectures that combine limited fast memory with abundant slower memory offer a promising solution, but existing hypervisor-based approaches suffer from significant performance penalties. We present Demeter, introducing a paradigm shift through guest-delegated tiered memory management based on two key insights: (1) delegation to guests eliminates both expensive access tracking at the hypervisor level and frequent TLB flushes that severely degrade memory virtualization performance under two-dimensional address translation, and (2) Processor Event-Based Sampling, which cannot be effectively utilized by hypervisor-based solutions, remains fully functional and highly efficient when properly leveraged within the guest. Building on these insights, Demeter designs an efficient range-based tiered memory management scheme in guest virtual address space to preserve locality information and employs a double balloon-based provisioning mechanism that maintains cloud elasticity while enabling vendor-specific QoS control. Our evaluation with seven real-world workloads across DRAM+PMEM and DRAM+CXL.mem configurations demonstrates that Demeter improves performance by up to 2× compared to existing hypervisor-based approaches and by 28% on average compared to the next best guest-based alternative. Our implementation is fully open source and publicly available at Zenodo.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存可扩展性已成为虚拟化云环境中的关键瓶颈。将有限的快速内存与丰富的慢速内存相结合的分层内存架构提供了一种有前途的解决方案，但现有的基于管理程序的方法遭受了严重的性能损失。我们提出 Demeter，通过基于两个关键见解的来宾委托分层内存管理引入了范式转变：(1) 对来宾的委派消除了虚拟机管理程序级别上昂贵的访问跟踪和频繁的 TLB 刷新，这会严重降低二维地址转换下的内存虚拟化性能；(2) 基于处理器事件的采样无法被基于虚拟机管理程序的解决方案有效利用，但在来宾中正确利用时，仍能保持完整的功能和高效。基于这些见解，Demeter 在来宾虚拟地址空间中设计了一种高效的基于范围的分层内存管理方案，以保留位置信息，并采用基于双气球的配置机制，在保持云弹性的同时实现特定于供应商的 QoS 控制。我们对 DRAM+PMEM 和 DRAM+CXL.mem 配置中的七个实际工作负载进行的评估表明，与现有的基于虚拟机管理程序的方法相比，Demeter 的性能提高了高达 2 倍，与下一个最佳的基于客户的替代方案相比，性能平均提高了 28%。我们的实现是完全开源的，并可在 Zenodo 上公开获取。

papers.title: Device-Assisted Live Migration of RDMA Devices.
papers.abstract:
Recently, we have seen growing pressure to move highperformance workloads, such as HPC and AI, to cloud environments that offer more affordable and manageable infrastructure. These workloads require direct access to RDMA devices for high-performance communication. Device passthrough, however, violates the decoupling between the guest OS and the underlying hardware, making Live Migration (LM) extremely challenging [29, 38, 40, 42, 48].

This paper presents a method for migrating a collection of directly interacting hardware devices in a manner that is transparent to both the VM and its network peers. We propose a device-assisted solution that includes (a) a generic device-hypervisor interface, (b) the design and implementation of LM support for the NVIDIA ConnectX family of network adapters, and (c) a novel scheme to quiesce direct communication over the memory fabric (e.g., PCIe).

We demonstrate transparent migration of HPC and AI workloads in accelerated virtual environments. Our approach incurs no runtime overhead or performance degradation after migration and achieves sub-second downtimes even for VMs with high RDMA resource utilization.
papers.abstract_zh:
最近，我们看到将高性能工作负载（例如 HPC 和 AI）迁移到提供更实惠且易于管理的基础设施的云环境的压力越来越大。这些工作负载需要直接访问 RDMA 设备以实现高性能通信。然而，设备直通违反了来宾操作系统和底层硬件之间的解耦，使得实时迁移（LM）极具挑战性[29,38,40,42,48]。

本文提出了一种以对虚拟机及其网络对等方透明的方式迁移直接交互的硬件设备集合的方法。我们提出了一种设备辅助解决方案，其中包括 (a) 通用设备管理程序接口、(b) NVIDIA ConnectX 系列网络适配器的 LM 支持的设计和实现，以及 (c) 一种通过内存结构（例如 PCIe）停止直接通信的新颖方案。

我们演示了加速虚拟环境中 HPC 和 AI 工作负载的透明迁移。我们的方法在迁移后不会产生运行时开销或性能下降，甚至对于具有高 RDMA 资源利用率的虚拟机也能实现亚秒级停机时间。

papers.title: DiffKV: Differentiated Memory Management for Large Language Models with Parallel KV Compaction.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities but face substantial serving costs due to their high memory demands, with the key-value (KV) cache being a primary bottleneck. State-of-the-art KV cache compression techniques, such as quantization and pruning, apply uniform treatment to both keys and values, and discard unimportant tokens entirely, overlooking the fine-grained distinctions in the significance of individual KV cache components. To address such limitations, we introduce DiffKV , a novel framework for efficient KV cache compression that exploits three levels of differentiation in the KV cache: (1) the differing impact of keys and values on attention computation, (2) the varying importance of tokens, and (3) the diverse dynamic sparsity patterns across attention heads. These levels of differentiation introduce irregular memory usage patterns across different requests and attention heads, posing significant scalability challenges for memory management. To address these challenges, DiffKV proposes an on-GPU memory manager that compacts fragmented free memory list into contiguous regions in parallel, effectively translating sparsity in the KV cache into performance gains. We evaluate DiffKV on several mainstream LLMs, including the emerging thinking models that generate extended chains of thought. DiffKV is able to compress the KV cache by 2.7× to 5.7× with near-lossless accuracy on complex workloads requiring sophisticated reasoning and long-generation capabilities, and enhances throughput by 1.9× to 5.4×.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 展示了卓越的功能，但由于其高内存需求而面临巨大的服务成本，其中键值 (KV) 缓存是主要瓶颈。最先进的 KV 缓存压缩技术，例如量化和剪枝，对键和值进行统一处理，并完全丢弃不重要的标记，忽略了各个 KV 缓存组件重要性的细粒度区别。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 DiffKV，这是一种高效 KV 缓存压缩的新颖框架，它利用 KV 缓存中的三个级别的差异：（1）键和值对注意力计算的不同影响，（2）令牌的不同重要性，以及（3）注意力头之间的不同动态稀疏模式。这些级别的差异在不同的请求和注意力头中引入了不规则的内存使用模式，给内存管理带来了重大的可扩展性挑战。为了应对这些挑战，DiffKV 提出了一种 GPU 内存管理器，它将碎片化的空闲内存列表并行压缩到连续区域，有效地将 KV 缓存中的稀疏性转化为性能增益。我们在几个主流法学硕士上评估了 DiffKV，包括产生扩展思维链的新兴思维模型。 DiffKV 能够在需要复杂推理和长生成能力的复杂工作负载上以近乎无损的精度将 KV 缓存压缩 2.7 倍至 5.7 倍，并将吞吐量提高 1.9 倍至 5.4 倍。

papers.title: eBPF Misbehavior Detection: Fuzzing with a Specification-Based Oracle.
papers.abstract:
Bugs in the Linux eBPF verifier may cause it to mistakenly accept unsafe eBPF programs or reject safe ones, causing either security or usability issues. While prior works on fuzzing the eBPF verifier have been effective, their bug oracles only hint at the existence of bugs indirectly ( e.g. , when a memory error occurs in downstream execution) instead of showing the root cause, confining them to uncover a narrow range of security bugs only with no detection of usability issues.

In this paper, we propose SpecCheck, a specification-based oracle integrated with our fuzzer Veritas, to detect a wide range of bugs in the eBPF verifier. SpecCheck encodes eBPF instruction semantics and safety properties as a specification and turns the claim of whether a concrete eBPF program is safe into checking the satisfiability of the corresponding safety constraints, which can be reasoned automatically without abstraction. The output from the oracle will be crosschecked with the eBPF verifier for any discrepancies. Using SpecCheck, Veritas uncovered 13 bugs in the Linux eBPF verifier, including severe bugs that can cause privilege escalation or information leakage, as well as bugs that cause frustration in even experienced kernel developers.
papers.abstract_zh:
Linux eBPF 验证器中的错误可能会导致其错误地接受不安全的 eBPF 程序或拒绝安全的程序，从而导致安全或可用性问题。虽然之前对 eBPF 验证器进行模糊测试的工作是有效的，但他们的 bug 预言只是间接暗示 bug 的存在（例如，当下游执行中发生内存错误时），而不是显示根本原因，从而限制了他们仅发现一小部分安全 bug，而没有检测到可用性问题。

在本文中，我们提出了 SpecCheck，这是一种与我们的模糊器 Veritas 集成的基于规范的预言机，用于检测 eBPF 验证器中的各种错误。 SpecCheck将eBPF指令语义和安全属性编码为规范，并将具体eBPF程序是否安全的声明转化为检查相应安全约束的可满足性，无需抽象即可自动推理。预言机的输出将与 eBPF 验证器交叉检查是否存在任何差异。 Veritas 使用 SpecCheck 发现了 Linux eBPF 验证程序中的 13 个错误，其中包括可能导致权限升级或信息泄漏的严重错误，以及甚至会让经验丰富的内核开发人员感到沮丧的错误。

papers.title: Fast End-to-End Performance Simulation of Accelerated Hardware-Software Stacks.
papers.abstract:
The increased use of hardware acceleration has created a need for efficient simulators of the end-to-end performance of accelerated hardware-software stacks: both software and hardware developers need to evaluate the impact of their design choices on overall system performance. However, accurate full-stack simulations are extremely slow, taking hours to simulate just 1 second of real execution. As a result, development of accelerated stacks is non-interactive, and this hurts productivity.

We propose a way to simulate end-to-end performance that is orders-of-magnitude faster yet still accurate. The main idea is to take a minimalist approach: We simulate only those components of the system that are not available, and run the rest natively. Even for unavailable components, we simulate cycle-accurately only aspects that are performance-critical. The key challenge is how to correctly and efficiently synchronize the natively executing components with the simulated ones.

Using this approach, we demonstrate 6× to 879× speedup compared to the state of the art, across three different hardware-accelerated stacks. The accuracy of simulated time is high: 7% error rate on average and 14% in the worst case, assuming CPU cores are not underprovisioned. Reducing simulation time down to seconds enables interactive development of accelerated stacks, which was until now not possible.
papers.abstract_zh:
硬件加速使用的增加产生了对加速硬件-软件堆栈的端到端性能的高效模拟器的需求：软件和硬件开发人员都需要评估其设计选择对整体系统性能的影响。然而，准确的全栈模拟速度非常慢，需要几个小时才能模拟仅 1 秒的实际执行。因此，加速堆栈的开发是非交互式的，这会损害生产力。

我们提出了一种模拟端到端性能的方法，该方法速度快几个数量级，但仍然准确。主要思想是采用极简方法：我们仅模拟系统中不可用的组件，并在本地运行其余组件。即使对于不可用的组件，我们也仅对性能关键的方面进行精确的周期模拟。关键的挑战是如何正确有效地同步本机执行组件与模拟组件。

使用这种方法，我们在三个不同的硬件加速堆栈上展示了与现有技术相比 6 倍到 879 倍的加速。模拟时间的准确性很高：假设 CPU 核心没有配置不足，平均错误率为 7%，最坏情况下为 14%。将仿真时间减少到几秒可以实现加速堆栈的交互式开发，而这在以前是不可能的。

papers.title: Fawkes: Finding Data Durability Bugs in DBMSs via Recovered Data State Verification.
papers.abstract:
Data durability is a fundamental requirement in DBMSs, ensuring that committed data remains intact despite unexpected faults such as power failures. Despite its critical importance, implementations of durability and recovery mechanisms continue to exhibit flaws, leading to severe issues(e.g., data loss, data inconsistency), which we refer to as Data Durability Bugs (DDBs). However, there is a limited understanding of the characteristics and root causes of DDBs. Furthermore, existing testing methods(e.g., Mallory) are often inadequate for detecting DDBs, particularly those that cause data loss or data inconsistency following DBMS failures.

This paper presents a comprehensive study of 43 DDBs across four widely used DBMSs. It reveals that DDBs primarily manifest as data loss, data inconsistency, log corruption, and system unavailability, often stem from flawed durability and recovery mechanisms, and are typically triggered when faults occur during filesystem or kernel-level calls. Based on these findings, we developed Fawkes, a testing framework to detect DDBs with recovered data state verification. It employs context-aware fault injection to target critical filesystem and kernel-level regions, functionality-guided fault triggering to explore untested paths, and checkpoint-based data graph verification to detect post-crash inconsistencies. We applied Fawkes to eight popular DBMSs and discovered 48 previously unknown DDBs, of which 16 have been fixed and 8 have been assigned CVE identifiers due to the severity.
papers.abstract_zh:
数据持久性是 DBMS 的基本要求，确保提交的数据在出现意外故障（例如电源故障）时保持完整。尽管其至关重要，但持久性和恢复机制的实现仍然存在缺陷，导致严重的问题（例如数据丢失、数据不一致），我们将其称为数据持久性错误（DDB）。然而，人们对 DDB 的特征和根本原因了解有限。此外，现有的测试方法（例如 Mallory）通常不足以检测 DDB，特别是那些在 DBMS 故障后导致数据丢失或数据不一致的方法。

本文对四种广泛使用的 DBMS 中的 43 个 DDB 进行了全面研究。它揭示了 DDB 主要表现为数据丢失、数据不一致、日志损坏和系统不可用，通常源于有缺陷的持久性和恢复机制，并且通常在文件系统或内核级调用期间发生故障时触发。基于这些发现，我们开发了 Fawkes，这是一个测试框架，用于检测具有恢复数据状态验证的 DDB。它采用上下文感知故障注入来定位关键文件系统和内核级区域，采用功能引导的故障触发来探索未经测试的路径，并采用基于检查点的数据图验证来检测崩溃后的不一致。我们将 Fawkes 应用于 8 个流行的 DBMS，发现了 48 个以前未知的 DDB，其中 16 个已修复，8 个由于严重性已被分配 CVE 标识符。

papers.title: FlexGuard: Fast Mutual Exclusion Independent of Subscription.
papers.abstract: Performance-oriented applications require efficient locks to harness the computing power of multicore architectures. While fast, spinlock algorithms suffer severe performance degradation when thread counts exceed available hardware capacity, i.e. , in oversubscribed scenarios. Existing solutions rely on imprecise heuristics for blocking, leading to suboptimal performance. We present FlexGuard, the first approach that systematically switches from busy-waiting to blocking precisely when a lock-holding thread is preempted. Flex-Guard achieves this by communicating with the OS scheduler via eBPF, unlike prior approaches. FlexGuard matches or improves performance in LevelDB, a memory-optimized database index, PARSEC's Dedup, and SPLASH2X's Raytrace and Streamcluster, boosting throughput by 1–6× in non-oversubscribed and up to 5× in oversubscribed scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 面向性能的应用程序需要高效的锁来利用多核架构的计算能力。虽然速度很快，但当线程数超过可用硬件容量时（即在超额订阅的情况下），自旋锁算法的性能会严重下降。现有的解决方案依赖于不精确的启发式阻塞，导致性能不佳。我们提出了 FlexGuard，这是第一种在持有锁的线程被抢占时系统地从忙等待切换到阻塞的方法。与之前的方法不同，Flex-Guard 通过 eBPF 与操作系统调度程序通信来实现这一点。 FlexGuard 与 LevelDB、内存优化数据库索引、PARSEC 的 Dedup 以及 SPLASH2X 的 Raytrace 和 Streamcluster 的性能相匹配或提高，在非超额订阅情况下将吞吐量提高 1-6 倍，在超额订阅情况下最高可提高 5 倍。

papers.title: Ghost in the Android Shell: Pragmatic Test-oracle Specification of a Production Hypervisor.
papers.abstract:
Developing systems code that robustly provides its intended security guarantees remains very challenging: conventional practice does not suffice, and full functional verification, while now feasible in some contexts, has substantial barriers to entry and use.

In this paper, we explore an alternative, more lightweight approach to building confidence for a production hypervisor: the pKVM hypervisor developed by Google to protect virtual machines and the Android kernel from each other. The basic approach is very simple and dates back to the 1970s: we specify the desired behaviour in a way that can be used as a test oracle, and check correspondence between that and the implementation at runtime. The setting makes that challenging in several ways: the implementation and specification are intertwined with the underlying architecture; the hypervisor is highly concurrent; the specification has to be loose in certain ways; the hypervisor runs bare-metal in a privileged exception level; naive random testing would quickly crash the whole system; and the hypervisor is written in C using conventional methods. We show how all of these can be overcome to make a practically useful specification, finding a number of critical bugs in pKVM along the way.

This is not at all what conventional developers (nor what formal verifiers) normally do – but we argue that, with the appropriate mindset, they easily could and should.
papers.abstract_zh:
开发能够可靠地提供其预期安全保证的系统代码仍然非常具有挑战性：传统实践是不够的，而完整的功能验证虽然现在在某些情况下是可行的，但在进入和使用方面存在很大的障碍。

在本文中，我们探索了一种替代的、更轻量级的方法来为生产虚拟机管理程序建立信心：由 Google 开发的 pKVM 虚拟机管理程序，用于保护虚拟机和 Android 内核免受彼此的影响。基本方法非常简单，可以追溯到 20 世纪 70 年代：我们以可用作测试预言机的方式指定所需的行为，并在运行时检查该行为与实现之间的对应关系。这种设置在几个方面使这一点变得具有挑战性：实现和规范与底层架构交织在一起；虚拟机管理程序是高度并发的；规范在某些方面必须宽松；虚拟机管理程序以特权异常级别在裸机上运行；幼稚的随机测试很快就会使整个系统崩溃； Hypervisor采用常规方法用C语言编写。我们展示了如何克服所有这些问题以制定实用的规范，并在此过程中发现 pKVM 中的许多关键错误。

这根本不是传统开发人员（也不是正式验证者）通常所做的事情——但我们认为，只要有适当的心态，他们很容易就能而且应该这样做。

papers.title: HedraRAG: Co-Optimizing Generation and Retrieval for Heterogeneous RAG Workflows.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we identify and tackle emerging system-level challenges in serving heterogeneous RAG workflows, characterized by complex stages and diverse request patterns. We present HedraRAG, a new system built on RAGraph, a graph-based abstraction that exposes optimization opportunities across stage-level parallelism, intra-request similarity, and inter-request skewness. These opportunities are expressed through graph transformations, including node splitting, reordering, edge addition and rewiring. Transformations are dynamically applied to wavefronts of subgraphs across concurrent requests and scheduled onto the CPU-GPU pipeline. Experiments across a wide range of workflows demonstrate that HedraRAG achieves more that 1.5× and up to 5× speedup over existing frameworks, offering a comprehensive solution for heterogeneous RAG workload serving.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们识别并解决了服务异构 RAG 工作流程时出现的新系统级挑战，其特点是复杂的阶段和多样化的请求模式。我们推出了 HedraRAG，这是一个基于 RAGraph 构建的新系统，RAGraph 是一种基于图形的抽象，可提供跨阶段级并行性、请求内相似性和请求间偏度的优化机会。这些机会通过图转换来表达，包括节点分裂、重新排序、边添加和重新连线。转换会跨并发请求动态应用于子图的波前，并调度到 CPU-GPU 管道上。跨各种工作流程的实验表明，HedraRAG 比现有框架实现了 1.5 倍以上甚至高达 5 倍的加速，为异构 RAG 工作负载服务提供了全面的解决方案。

papers.title: How to Copy Memory? Coordinated Asynchronous Copy as a First-Class OS Service.
papers.abstract: In modern systems, memory copy remains a critical performance bottleneck across various scenarios, playing a pervasive role in system-wide execution such as syscalls, IPC, and user-mode applications. Numerous efforts have aimed at optimizing copy performance, including zero-copy with page remapping and hardware-accelerated copy. However, they typically target specific use cases, such as Linux zero-copy send() for messages of ≥10KB. This paper argues for copy as a first-class OS service, offer ing three key benefits: (1) with the asynchronous copy abstraction provided by the service, applications can overlap their execution with copy; (2) the service can effectively utilize hardware capabilities to enhance copy performance; (3) the service's global view of copies further enables holistic optimization. To this end, we introduce Copier, a new OS service of coordinated asynchronous copy , to serve both user-mode applications and OS services. We build Copier-Linux to demonstrate Copier's ability to improve performance for diverse use cases, including Redis, Protobuf, network stack, proxy, etc. Evaluations show that Copier achieves up to a 1.8 × speedup for real-world applications like Redis and a 1.6 × improvement over zIO, the state-of-the-art in optimizing copy efficiency. To further facilitate adoption, we develop a toolchain to ease the use of Copier. We also integrate Copier into a commercial smartphone OS (HarmonyOS 5.0), achieving promising results.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代系统中，内存复制仍然是各种场景中的关键性能瓶颈，在系统调用、IPC 和用户模式应用程序等系统范围执行中发挥着普遍作用。许多努力旨在优化复制性能，包括带有页面重新映射的零复制和硬件加速复制。然而，它们通常针对特定的用例，例如用于 ≥10KB 消息的 Linux 零拷贝 send()。本文主张将复制作为一流的操作系统服务，提供三个关键好处：（1）通过服务提供的异步复制抽象，应用程序可以将其执行与复制重叠； (2) 该服务能够有效利用硬件能力来增强复制性能； (3)服务的全局副本视图进一步实现了整体优化。为此，我们引入了Copier，一种新的协调异步复制的操作系统服务，为用户模式应用程序和操作系统服务提供服务。我们构建 Copier-Linux 是为了展示 Copier 提高各种用例性能的能力，包括 Redis、Protobuf、网络堆栈、代理等。评估表明，Copier 对 Redis 等实际应用程序实现了高达 1.8 倍的加速，比 zIO 提高了 1.6 倍，zIO 是优化复制效率的最先进技术。为了进一步促进采用，我们开发了一个工具链来简化 Copier 的使用。我们还将Copier集成到商业智能手机操作系统（HarmonyOS 5.0）中，取得了可喜的成果。

papers.title: IC-Cache: Efficient Large Language Model Serving via In-context Caching.
papers.abstract:
Large language models (LLMs) have excelled in various applications, yet serving them at scale is challenging due to their substantial resource demands and high latency. Our real-world studies reveal that over 70% of user requests to LLMs have semantically similar counterparts, suggesting the potential for knowledge transfer among requests. However, naively caching and reusing past responses leads to a big quality drop.

In this paper, we introduce IC-Cache, a caching system that enables live LLM capability augmentation to improve serving efficiency: by leveraging historical request-response pairs from larger models as in-context examples, IC-Cache empowers small LLMs to imitate and even exceed the compositional abilities (e.g., reasoning) of their larger counterparts, enabling selective offloading of requests to reduce cost and latency. Achieving this live augmentation at scale introduces intricate trade-offs between response quality, latency, and system throughput. For a new request, IC-Cache efficiently selects similar, high-utility examples to prepend them to the new request's input. At scale, it adaptively routes requests across LLMs of varying capabilities, accounting for response quality and serving loads. IC-Cache employs a cost-aware cache replay mechanism that refines example quality offline to maximize online cache utility and efficiency. Evaluations on millions of realistic requests demonstrate that IC-Cache improves LLM serving throughput by 1.4–5.9x and reduces latency by 28–71% without hurting response quality.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 在各种应用程序中表现出色，但由于其大量的资源需求和高延迟，大规模为其提供服务具有挑战性。我们的现实世界研究表明，超过 70% 的 LLM 用户请求具有语义相似的对应项，这表明请求之间存在知识转移的潜力。然而，天真地缓存和重用过去的响应会导致质量大幅下降。

在本文中，我们介绍了 IC-Cache，这是一种能够增强实时 LLM 能力以提高服务效率的缓存系统：通过利用较大模型的历史请求响应对作为上下文示例，IC-Cache 使小型 LLM 能够模仿甚至超越其较大对应模型的组合能力（例如推理），从而能够选择性卸载请求以降低成本和延迟。大规模实现这种实时增强需要在响应质量、延迟和系统吞吐量之间进行复杂的权衡。对于新请求，IC-Cache 会有效地选择类似的、高效用的示例，将它们添加到新请求的输入之前。在规模上，它可以在不同能力的法学硕士之间自适应地路由请求，同时考虑响应质量和服务负载。 IC-Cache 采用成本感知型缓存重放机制，可提高离线示例质量，从而最大限度地提高在线缓存效用和效率。对数百万个实际请求的评估表明，IC-Cache 将 LLM 服务吞吐量提高了 1.4–5.9 倍，并将延迟降低了 28–71%，而不会损害响应质量。

papers.title: Jenga: Effective Memory Management for Serving LLM with Heterogeneity.
papers.abstract:
Large language models are widely used but expensive to run. To reduce costs, it is crucial to maximize request batch size through efficient GPU memory management. Existing approaches, such as PagedAttention, struggle with modern LLMs because of the growing heterogeneity in the sizes of models' internal embeddings and attention mechanisms.

In this paper, we present Jenga, a memory allocation framework for these heterogeneous LLMs. Jenga tackles two key challenges: (1) memory fragmentation caused by embeddings of different sizes, and (2) unpredictable memory usage from varying attention mechanisms across layers. Jenga employs an attention-property-aware allocator, leveraging the least common multiple (LCM) of embedding sizes to optimize memory usage and performing cache eviction based on attention patterns to enhance memory reuse. We implement Jenga in vLLM, and evaluate it with diverse LLMs, datasets, and GPUs. Evaluations show that Jenga improves GPU memory utilization by up to 83% and serving throughput by up to 2.16× (1.46× on average).
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型被广泛使用，但运行成本昂贵。为了降低成本，通过高效的 GPU 内存管理来最大化请求批量大小至关重要。由于模型内部嵌入和注意力机制的大小日益增长的异质性，现有的方法（例如 PagedAttention）很难与现代法学硕士相媲美。

在本文中，我们提出 Jenga，一种用于这些异构 LLM 的内存分配框架。 Jenga 解决了两个关键挑战：（1）不同大小的嵌入导致的内存碎片，以及（2）跨层不同的注意力机制导致的不可预测的内存使用情况。 Jenga 采用注意力属性感知分配器，利用嵌入大小的最小公倍数 (LCM) 来优化内存使用，并根据注意力模式执行缓存驱逐以增强内存重用。我们在 vLLM 中实现 Jenga，并使用不同的 LLM、数据集和 GPU 对其进行评估。评估显示，Jenga 将 GPU 内存利用率提高高达 83%，服务吞吐量提高高达 2.16 倍（平均 1.46 倍）。

papers.title: KNighter: Transforming Static Analysis with LLM-Synthesized Checkers.
papers.abstract:
Static analysis is a powerful technique for bug detection in critical systems like operating system kernels. However, designing and implementing static analyzers is challenging, time-consuming, and typically limited to predefined bug patterns. While large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for static analysis, directly applying them to scan large systems remains impractical due to computational constraints and contextual limitations.

We present KNighter, the first approach that unlocks scalable LLM-based static analysis by automatically synthesizing static analyzers from historical bug patterns. Rather than using LLMs to directly analyze massive systems, our key insight is leveraging LLMs to generate specialized static analyzers guided by historical patch knowledge. KNighter implements this vision through a multi-stage synthesis pipeline that validates checker correctness against original patches and employs an automated refinement process to iteratively reduce false positives. Our evaluation on the Linux kernel demonstrates that KNighter generates high-precision checkers capable of detecting diverse bug patterns overlooked by existing human-written analyzers. To date, KNighter-synthesized checkers have discovered 92 new, critical, longlatent bugs (average 4.3 years) in the Linux kernel; 77 are confirmed, 57 fixed, and 30 have been assigned CVE numbers. This work establishes an entirely new paradigm for scalable, reliable, and traceable LLM-based static analysis for real-world systems via checker synthesis.
papers.abstract_zh:
静态分析是一种强大的技术，用于检测操作系统内核等关键系统中的错误。然而，设计和实现静态分析器具有挑战性、耗时，并且通常仅限于预定义的错误模式。虽然大型语言模型 (LLM) 已显示出静态分析的前景，但由于计算限制和上下文限制，直接应用它们来扫描大型系统仍然不切实际。

我们推出 KNighter，这是第一种通过从历史 bug 模式自动合成静态分析器来解锁可扩展的基于 LLM 的静态分析的方法。我们的关键见解是利用 LLM 生成由历史补丁知识引导的专门静态分析器，而不是使用 LLM 直接分析大型系统。 KNighter 通过多阶段综合管道实现这一愿景，该管道根据原始补丁验证检查器的正确性，并采用自动细化过程来迭代减少误报。我们对 Linux 内核的评估表明，KNighter 生成的高精度检查器能够检测现有人工编写的分析器忽略的各种错误模式。迄今为止，KNighter 合成的检查器已在 Linux 内核中发现了 92 个新的、严重的、长期潜伏的错误（平均 4.3 年）； 77 个已确认，57 个已修复，30 个已分配 CVE 编号。这项工作通过检查器合成为现实系统建立了一个全新的范例，用于可扩展、可靠和可追踪的基于 LLM 的静态分析。

papers.title: KTransformers: Unleashing the Full Potential of CPU/GPU Hybrid Inference for MoE Models.
papers.abstract:
Due to the sparse nature of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models, they are particularly suitable for hybrid CPU/GPU inference, especially in low-concurrency scenarios. This hybrid approach leverages both the large, cost-effective memory capacity of CPU/DRAM and the high bandwidth of GPU/VRAM. However, existing hybrid solutions remain bottlenecked by CPU computation limits and CPU-GPU synchronization overheads, severely restricting their ability to efficiently run state-of-the-art large MoE models, such as the 671B DeepSeek-V3/R1.

This paper presents KTransformers, a high-performance inference system designed specifically for efficient heterogeneous computing of diverse MoE models. KTransformers employs optimized, AMX-specialized kernels that fully utilize the computational capabilities of modern CPUs and incorporates an asynchronous CPU-GPU task scheduling mechanism to minimize overhead—achieving 4.62–19.74× prefilling speedups and 1.25–4.09× decoding speedups compared to existing systems.

Furthermore, we propose a novel Expert Deferral mechanism that strategically enhances the potential for overlapping CPU and GPU computations, increasing CPU utilization from typically below 75% to almost 100%. This yields up to 1.45× additional throughput beyond the aforementioned optimizations, with an average model accuracy drop of no more than 0.5% across a diverse set of benchmarks.

The resulting system, KTransformers, substantially enhances the accessibility of large MoE models for local users who prioritize security or intend to dig into the internals of the models. As a result, it has already been widely adopted within both the open-source community and industry.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于混合专家（MoE）模型的稀疏性，它们特别适合混合 CPU/GPU 推理，尤其是在低并发场景下。这种混合方法同时利用了 CPU/DRAM 的大容量、经济高效的内存容量和 GPU/VRAM 的高带宽。然而，现有的混合解决方案仍然受到 CPU 计算限制和 CPU-GPU 同步开销的瓶颈，严重限制了它们高效运行最先进的大型 MoE 模型（例如 671B DeepSeek-V3/R1）的能力。

本文介绍了 KTransformers，这是一种专为多种 MoE 模型的高效异构计算而设计的高性能推理系统。 KTransformers 采用优化的 AMX 专用内核，充分利用现代 CPU 的计算能力，并采用异步 CPU-GPU 任务调度机制来最大限度地减少开销，与现有系统相比，实现 4.62–19.74 倍预填充加速和 1.25–4.09 倍解码加速。

此外，我们提出了一种新颖的专家延迟机制，该机制战略性地增强了重叠 CPU 和 GPU 计算的潜力，将 CPU 利用率从通常低于 75% 提高到几乎 100%。与上述优化相比，这可产生高达 1.45 倍的额外吞吐量，在各种基准测试中，平均模型精度下降不超过 0.5%。

由此产生的系统 KTransformers 大大增强了优先考虑安全性或打算深入研究模型内部的本地用户对大型 MoE 模型的可访问性。因此，它已经在开源社区和行业中得到了广泛采用。

papers.title: LithOS: An Operating System for Efficient Machine Learning on GPUs.
papers.abstract:
The rapid growth of machine learning (ML) has made GPUs indispensable in datacenters and underscores the urgency of improving their efficiency. However, balancing diverse model demands with high utilization remains a fundamental challenge. Transparent, fine-grained GPU resource management that maximizes utilization, energy efficiency, and isolation requires an OS approach. This paper introduces LithOS , a first step towards a GPU OS.

LithOS includes the following new abstractions and mechanisms for efficient GPU management: (i) a novel TPC Scheduler that supports spatial scheduling at the granularity of individual TPCs, unlocking efficient TPC stealing between workloads; (ii) a transparent kernel atomizer to reduce head-of-line blocking and allow dynamic resource reallocation mid-execution; (iii) a lightweight hardware right-sizing mechanism that dynamically determines the minimal TPC resources needed per atom; and (iv) a transparent power management mechanism that reduces power consumption based upon in-flight work characteristics.

We build LithOS in Rust and evaluate its performance across a broad set of deep learning environments, comparing it to state-of-the-art solutions from NVIDIA and prior research. For inference stacking, LithOS reduces tail latencies by 13× compared to MPS; compared to the best-performing SotA, it reduces tail latencies by 4× while improving aggregate goodput by 1.3×. Furthermore, in hybrid inference-training stacking, LithOS reduces tail latencies by 4.7× compared to MPS; compared to the best-performing SotA, it reduces tail latencies by 1.18× while improving aggregate throughput by 1.35×. Finally, for a modest performance hit under 4%, LithOS's hardware right-sizing provides a quarter of GPU capacity savings on average, while for a 7% hit, LithOS's transparent power management delivers a quarter of GPU total energy savings on average. Overall, LithOS transparently increases GPU efficiency, establishing a foundation for future OS research on GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh:
机器学习 (ML) 的快速发展使得 GPU 在数据中心中不可或缺，并凸显了提高其效率的紧迫性。然而，平衡不同模型需求和高利用率仍然是一个根本挑战。透明、细粒度的 GPU 资源管理可以最大限度地提高利用率、能源效率和隔离性，需要采用操作系统方法。本文介绍了 LithOS，这是迈向 GPU 操作系统的第一步。

LithOS 包括以下用于高效 GPU 管理的新抽象和机制：(i) 新颖的 TPC 调度程序，支持单个 TPC 粒度的空间调度，从而解锁工作负载之间的高效 TPC 窃取； (ii) 透明的内核原子化器，以减少队头阻塞并允许在执行过程中进行动态资源重新分配； (iii) 轻量级硬件调整机制，动态确定每个原子所需的最小 TPC 资源； (iv) 透明的电源管理机制，可根据飞行中的工作特性降低功耗。

我们用 Rust 构建 LithOS，并在广泛的深度学习环境中评估其性能，将其与 NVIDIA 和先前研究的最先进的解决方案进行比较。对于推理堆叠，与 MPS 相比，LithOS 将尾部延迟降低了 13 倍；与性能最佳的 SotA 相比，它将尾部延迟降低了 4 倍，同时将总吞吐量提高了 1.3 倍。此外，在混合推理训练堆叠中，与 MPS 相比，LithOS 将尾部延迟降低了 4.7 倍；与性能最佳的 SotA 相比，它将尾部延迟减少了 1.18 倍，同时将总吞吐量提高了 1.35 倍。最后，对于 4% 以下的适度性能影响，LithOS 的硬件调整大小平均可节省四分之一的 GPU 容量，而对于 7% 的性能影响，LithOS 的透明电源管理平均可节省四分之一的 GPU 总能源。总体而言，LithOS 明显提高了 GPU 效率，为未来 GPU 上的操作系统研究奠定了基础。

papers.title: Loom: Efficient Capture and Querying of High-Frequency Telemetry.
papers.abstract:
To debug performance issues, engineers often rely on high-frequency telemetry (HFT) from sources like perf, DTrace, or eBPF, which can generate millions of records per second. Current database systems are too slow to capture such highrate data in its entirety, and the de facto standard approach of writing HFT to raw files makes queries slow and cumbersome. Engineers must therefore either work with incomplete data, which risks missing critical events, or accept slow queries.

Loom is a new system specialized for capturing and analyzing HFT with timely, interactive queries. Key to Loom's design is that it combines the high ingest capability of log-based storage with lightweight, sparse, and domain-specific indexes that accelerate queries. This design strikes a balance: it prioritizes capturing complete data at high rate while indexing just enough to support interactive queries on HFT.

Experiments show that Loom supports both higher ingest throughput and lower query latency than best-in-class systems for ingest-optimized storage (FishStore) and time series databases (InfluxDB), all while consuming substantially fewer host resources and ensuring data completeness.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了调试性能问题，工程师通常依赖来自 perf、DTrace 或 eBPF 等来源的高频遥测 (HFT)，这些数据每秒可以生成数百万条记录。当前的数据库系统速度太慢，无法完整捕获如此高速率的数据，而将 HFT 写入原始文件的事实上的标准方法使查询变得缓慢而麻烦。因此，工程师必须要么处理不完整的数据，这可能会丢失关键事件，要么接受缓慢的查询。

Loom 是一个专门用于通过及时的交互式查询捕获和分析高频交易的新系统。 Loom 设计的关键在于，它将基于日志的存储的高摄取能力与可加速查询的轻量级、稀疏且特定于域的索引相结合。这种设计达到了平衡：它优先考虑高速捕获完整数据，同时索引足以支持高频交易的交互式查询。

实验表明，与用于摄取优化存储 (FishStore) 和时间序列数据库 (InfluxDB) 的同类最佳系统相比，Loom 支持更高的摄取吞吐量和更低的查询延迟，同时消耗的主机资源大幅减少并确保数据完整性。

papers.title: Managing Scalable Direct Storage Accesses for GPUs with GoFS.
papers.abstract:
As we shift from CPU-centric computing to GPU-accelerated computing for supporting intelligent data processing at scale, the storage bottleneck has been exacerbated. To bypass the host CPUand alleviate unnecessary data movements, modern GPUs enable direct storage access to SSDs (i.e., GPUDirect Storage). However, current GPUDirect Storage solutions still rely on the host file system to manage the storage device, direct storage accesses are still bottlenecked by the host.

In this paper, we develop a G PU- o rchestrated f ile s ystem (GoFS) for scaling the direct storage accesses for GPU programs, by fully offloading the storage management to the GPU. As GoFS provides POSIX API and manages core filesystem structures in GPU memory, it can execute both control path and data path without host CPU involvement. To enable highly concurrent direct storage accesses, we rethink the design and implementation of core filesystem structures with various optimization techniques, such as scalable data indexing, fine-grained per-SM (streaming multiprocessor) block management, and zero-copy I/O accesses, by carefully exploring the GPU-accelerated computing paradigm. GoFS preserves the essential filesystem properties such as crash consistency, and it is compatible with existing host-based file systems like F2FS. GoFS does not require changes to the on-disk filesystem organization, therefore, the host and GPU can manage the SSD in a coordinated fashion, and maintain the data consistency in a primary/secondary mode. We implement GoFS based on F2FS using 7.9K lines of codes with CUDA programming. We examine its efficiency on an A100 GPU. Our experiments with various GPU-based applications show that GoFS outperforms state-of-the-art storage access solutions for GPUs by 1.61× on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着我们从以 CPU 为中心的计算转向以 GPU 加速的计算来支持大规模智能数据处理，存储瓶颈已经加剧。为了绕过主机 CPU 并减少不必要的数据移动，现代 GPU 启用了对 SSD 的直接存储访问（即 GPU 直接存储）。然而，目前的GPUDirect Storage解决方案仍然依赖主机文件系统来管理存储设备，直接存储访问仍然受到主机的瓶颈。

在本文中，我们开发了一种 GPU 协调文件系统（GoFS），通过将存储管理完全卸载到 GPU 来扩展 GPU 程序的直接存储访问。由于 GoFS 提供 POSIX API 并管理 GPU 内存中的核心文件系统结构，因此它可以执行控制路径和数据路径，而无需主机 CPU 的参与。为了实现高度并发的直接存储访问，我们通过仔细探索 GPU 加速计算范例，重新思考核心文件系统结构的设计和实现，采用各种优化技术，例如可扩展数据索引、细粒度每 SM（流式多处理器）块管理和零复制 I/O 访问。 GoFS 保留了基本的文件系统属性，例如崩溃一致性，并且与 F2FS 等现有的基于主机的文件系统兼容。 GoFS不需要改变磁盘上的文件系统组织，因此主机和GPU可以协调管理SSD，并以主从模式保持数据一致性。我们使用 7.9K 行代码并通过 CUDA 编程实现了基于 F2FS 的 GoFS。我们在 A100 GPU 上检查其效率。我们对各种基于 GPU 的应用程序进行的实验表明，GoFS 的性能平均比最先进的 GPU 存储访问解决方案高出 1.61 倍。

papers.title: Mantle: Efficient Hierarchical Metadata Management for Cloud Object Storage Services.
papers.abstract:
Cloud Object Storage Services (COSSs) are the primary storage backend in the cloud, supporting large-scale analytics and ML workloads that frequently access deep object paths and update metadata concurrently. However, current COSS architectures incur costly multi-round lookups and high directory contention, delaying job execution. Prior optimizations, largely designed for distributed file systems (with least adoption in clouds), do not apply due to COSS-specific constraints like stateless proxies and limited APIs.

Mantle is a new COSS metadata service for modern cloud workloads. It adopts a two-layer architecture: a scalable, sharded database (TafDB) shared across namespaces and a per-namespace, single-server IndexNode consolidating lightweight directory metadata. With a fine-grained division of metadata and responsibility, Mantle supports up to 10 billion objects or directories in a single namespace and achieves 1.8 million lookups per second through scalable execution of single-RPC lookups on IndexNode. It also delivers up to 58K directory updates per second under high contention by integrating out-of-place delta updates in TafDB and offloading loop detection for cross-directory renames to IndexNode, both effectively eliminating coordination bottlenecks. Compared to the metadata services of Tectonic, InfiniFS and LocoFS, Mantle reduces metadata latency by 6.6-99.1% and improves throughput by 0.07-115.00×. With data access enabled, it shortens job completion times by 63.3–93.3% for interactive Spark analytics and 38.5–47.7% for AI-driven audio preprocessing tasks. Mantle has been deployed on Baidu Object Storage (BOS) for over 2 years, a service offered by Baidu Canghai Storage.
papers.abstract_zh:
云对象存储服务 (COSS) 是云中的主要存储后端，支持频繁访问深层对象路径并同时更新元数据的大规模分析和 ML 工作负载。然而，当前的 COSS 架构会产生成本高昂的多轮查找和高目录争用，从而延迟作业执行。之前的优化主要是为分布式文件系统设计的（在云中采用最少），但由于 COSS 特定的限制（例如无状态代理和有限的 API）而不再适用。

Mantle 是一项针对现代云工作负载的新 COSS 元数据服务。它采用两层架构：跨命名空间共享的可扩展分片数据库（TafDB）和每个命名空间的单服务器 IndexNode，整合轻量级目录元数据。通过元数据和职责的细粒度划分，Mantle 在单个命名空间中支持多达 100 亿个对象或目录，并通过在 IndexNode 上可扩展地执行单 RPC 查找来实现每秒 180 万次查找。它还通过在 TafDB 中集成异地增量更新以及将跨目录重命名的循环检测卸载到 IndexNode，在高争用情况下每秒提供高达 58K 的目录更新，两者都有效地消除了协调瓶颈。与 Tectonic、InfiniFS 和 LocoFS 的元数据服务相比，Mantle 将元数据延迟降低了 6.6-99.1%，吞吐量提高了 0.07-115.00 倍。启用数据访问后，交互式 Spark 分析的作业完成时间缩短了 63.3–93.3%，AI 驱动的音频预处理任务的作业完成时间缩短了 38.5–47.7%。 Mantle 已在百度对象存储（BOS）上部署超过 2 年，该服务由百度沧海存储提供。

papers.title: Mercury: Unlocking Multi-GPU Operator Optimization for LLMs via Remote Memory Scheduling.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose Mercury, a multi-GPU operator compiler based on a loop-based intermediate representation, CommIR. At the core of Mercury is an abstraction that treats remote GPU memory as an explicitly managed extension of the memory hierarchy, expanding the available storage and communication resources beyond local HBM. This unified view enables the compiler to reason holistically about data placement and inter-device communication, unlocking a vastly larger design space that encompasses and extends beyond existing manual strategies. As a result, Mercury is able to automatically reproduce the performance of hand-optimized baselines like RingAttention and Ulysses, and in some configurations, even discovers more effective strategies that manual designs have overlooked. Our implementation is open-sourced at https://github.com/ChandlerGuan/mercury_artifact.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Mercury，一种基于循环中间表示 CommIR 的多 GPU 运算符编译器。 Mercury 的核心是一种抽象，它将远程 GPU 内存视为内存层次结构的显式管理扩展，将可用存储和通信资源扩展到本地 HBM 之外。这种统一的视图使编译器能够对数据放置和设备间通信进行整体推理，从而释放出更大的设计空间，涵盖并扩展了现有的手动策略。因此，Mercury 能够自动重现像 RingAttention 和 Ulysses 这样的手动优化基线的性能，并且在某些配置中，甚至发现了手动设计忽略的更有效的策略。我们的实现是开源的，位于 https://github.com/ChandlerGuan/mercury_artifact。

papers.title: METIS: Fast Quality-Aware RAG Systems with Configuration Adaptation.
papers.abstract: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) allows LLMs (large language models) to generate better responses with external knowledge, but using more external knowledge causes higher response delay. Prior work focuses either on reducing the response delay (e.g. , better scheduling of RAG queries) or on maximizing quality (e.g. , tuning the RAG workflow), but they fall short in systematically balancing the tradeoff between the delay and quality of RAG responses. To balance both quality and response delay, this paper presents METIS, the first RAG system that jointly schedules queries and adapts the key RAG configurations of each query, such as the number of retrieved text chunks and synthesis methods. Using four popular RAG-QA datasets, we show that compared to the state-of-the-art RAG optimization schemes, METIS reduces the generation latency by 1.64 – 2.54× without sacrificing generation quality.
papers.abstract_zh: RAG（检索增强生成）允许LLM（大型语言模型）利用外部知识生成更好的响应，但使用更多的外部知识会导致更高的响应延迟。先前的工作要么侧重于减少响应延迟（例如，更好地调度 RAG 查询），要么侧重于最大化质量（例如，调整 RAG 工作流程），但它们未能系统地平衡 RAG 响应的延迟和质量之间的权衡。为了平衡质量和响应延迟，本文提出了 METIS，这是第一个联合调度查询并调整每个查询的关键 RAG 配置（例如检索的文本块的数量和合成方法）的 RAG 系统。使用四个流行的 RAG-QA 数据集，我们表明，与最先进的 RAG 优化方案相比，METIS 将生成延迟降低了 1.64 – 2.54 倍，而无需牺牲生成质量。

papers.title: Mitigating Application Resource Overload with Targeted Task Cancellation.
papers.abstract:
Modern software inevitably encounters periods of resource overload, during which it must still sustain high servicelevel objective (SLO) attainment while minimizing request loss. However, achieving this balance is challenging due to subtle and unpredictable internal resource contention among concurrently executing requests. Traditional overload control mechanisms, which rely on global signals, such as queuing delays, fail to handle application resource overload effectively because they cannot accurately predict which requests will monopolize critical resources.

In this paper, we propose Atropos, an overload control framework that proactively cancels the culprit request that cause severe resource contention rather than the victim requests that are blocked by it. Atropos continuously monitors the resource usage of executing requests, identifies the requests contributing most significantly to resource overload, and selectively cancels them. We integrate Atropos into six large-scale applications and evaluate it against 16 real-world overload scenarios. Our results show that Atropos maintains the performance goals while achieving minimal request drop, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代软件不可避免地会遇到资源过载的情况，在此期间，它仍然必须维持高服务级别目标 (SLO) 的实现，同时最大限度地减少请求损失。然而，由于并发执行的请求之间存在微妙且不可预测的内部资源争用，因此实现这种平衡具有挑战性。传统的过载控制机制依赖于全局信号（例如排队延迟），无法有效地处理应用程序资源过载，因为它们无法准确预测哪些请求将独占关键资源。

在本文中，我们提出了 Atropos，一种过载控制框架，它主动取消导致严重资源争用的罪魁祸首请求，而不是被它阻止的受害者请求。 Atropos 持续监控执行请求的资源使用情况，识别对资源过载影响最大的请求，并有选择地取消它们。我们将 Atropos 集成到 6 个大型应用程序中，并根据 16 个现实世界的过载场景对其进行评估。我们的结果表明，Atropos 保持了性能目标，同时实现了最小的请求下降，显着优于最先进的解决方案。

papers.title: Moirai: Optimizing Placement of Data and Compute in Hybrid Clouds.
papers.abstract:
The deployment of large-scale data analytics between on-premise and cloud sites, i.e., hybrid clouds , requires careful partitioning of both data and computation to avoid massive networking costs. We present Moirai, a cost-optimization framework that analyzes job accesses and data dependencies and optimizes the placement of both in hybrid clouds. Moirai informs the job scheduler of data location and access predictions, so it can determine where jobs should be executed to minimize data transfer costs. Our optimizer achieves scalability and cost efficiency by exploiting recurring jobs to identify data dependencies and job access characteristics and reduces the search space by excluding data not accessed recently.

We validate Moirai using 4-month traces that span 66.7M queries accessing 13.3EB from Presto and Spark clusters deployed at Uber, a multi-national transportation company leveraging large-scale data analytics for its operations. Moirai reduces hybrid cloud deployment costs by over 97% relative to the state-of-the-art partitioning approach from Alibaba and other public approaches. The savings come from 95–99.5% reduction in cloud egress, up to 99% reduction in replication, and 89–98% reduction in on-premises network infrastructure requirements. We also describe concrete steps being taken towards deploying Moirai in production.
papers.abstract_zh:
在本地和云站点（即混合云）之间部署大规模数据分析需要仔细划分数据和计算，以避免大量的网络成本。我们推出了 Moirai，这是一个成本优化框架，可分析作业访问和数据依赖性并优化两者在混合云中的放置。 Moirai 向作业调度程序通知数据位置和访问预测，以便它可以确定应在何处执行作业以最大限度地降低数据传输成本。我们的优化器通过利用重复作业来识别数据依赖性和作业访问特征来实现可扩展性和成本效率，并通过排除最近未访问的数据来减少搜索空间。

我们使用 4 个月的跟踪来验证 Moirai，这些跟踪跨越 6670 万个查询，从部署在 Uber 的 Presto 和 Spark 集群访问 13.3EB，Uber 是一家利用大规模数据分析进行运营的跨国运输公司。相对于阿里巴巴和其他公共方法最先进的分区方法，Moirai 将混合云部署成本降低了 97% 以上。节省的原因是云出口量减少了 95-99.5%，复制量减少了 99%，以及本地网络基础设施要求减少了 89-98%。我们还描述了在生产中部署 Moirai 所采取的具体步骤。

papers.title: Mycroft: Tracing Dependencies in Collective Communication Towards Reliable LLM Training.
papers.abstract:
Reliability is essential for ensuring efficiency in LLM training. However, many real-world reliability issues remain difficult to resolve, resulting in wasted resources and degraded model performance. Unfortunately, today's collective communication libraries operate as black boxes, hiding critical information needed for effective root cause analysis.

We propose Mycroft, a lightweight distributed tracing and root cause analysis system designed to address previously hidden reliability issues in collective communication. Mycroft's key idea is to trace collective communication states and leverage internal control and data dependencies to resolve reliability problems in LLM training. Mycroft has been deployed at ByteDance for over six months to debug collective communication-related issues at runtime. It detected anomalies within 15 seconds in 90% of cases and identified the root cause within 20 seconds in 60% of cases. We also conducted extensive fault injection experiments to demonstrate Mycroft's capability and efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
可靠性对于确保法学硕士培训的效率至关重要。然而，许多现实世界的可靠性问题仍然难以解决，导致资源浪费和模型性能下降。不幸的是，当今的集体通信库就像黑匣子一样运作，隐藏了有效根本原因分析所需的关键信息。

我们提出了 Mycroft，一种轻量级分布式跟踪和根本原因分析系统，旨在解决集体通信中以前隐藏的可靠性问题。 Mycroft 的关键思想是跟踪集体通信状态并利用内部控制和数据依赖性来解决 LLM 培训中的可靠性问题。 Mycroft 已在字节跳动部署了六个多月，用于在运行时调试与通信相关的集体问题。它在 90% 的情况下在 15 秒内检测到异常，并在 60% 的情况下在 20 秒内确定根本原因。我们还进行了广泛的故障注入实验来证明 Mycroft 的能力和效率。

papers.title: Oasis: Pooling PCIe Devices Over CXL to Boost Utilization.
papers.abstract: PCIe devices, such as NICs and SSDs, are frequently underutilized in cloud platforms. PCIe device pools, in which multiple hosts can share a set of PCIe devices, could increase PCIe device utilization and reduce their total cost of ownership. The main way to achieve PCIe device pools today is via PCIe switches, but they are expensive and inflexible. We design Oasis, 1 a system that pools PCIe devices in software over CXL memory pools. CXL memory pools are already being deployed to boost datacenter memory utilization and reduce costs. Once CXL pools are in place, they can serve as an efficient data path between hosts and PCIe devices. Oasis provides a control plane and datapath over CXL pools, mapping and routing PCIe device traffic across host boundaries. PCIe devices with different functionalities can be supported by adding an Oasis engine for each device class. We implement an Oasis network engine to demonstrate NIC pooling. Our evaluation shows that Oasis improves the NIC utilization by 2× and handles NIC failover with only a 38 ms interruption.
papers.abstract_zh: PCIe 设备（例如 NIC 和 SSD）在云平台中经常未得到充分利用。 PCIe 设备池（其中多个主机可以共享一组 PCIe 设备）可以提高 PCIe 设备利用率并降低总体拥有成本。目前实现 PCIe 设备池的主要方式是通过 PCIe 交换机，但它们价格昂贵且不灵活。我们设计了 Oasis，1 一个通过 CXL 内存池在软件中汇集 PCIe 设备的系统。 CXL 内存池已被部署，以提高数据中心内存利用率并降低成本。一旦 CXL 池就位，它们就可以充当主机和 PCIe 设备之间的高效数据路径。 Oasis 在 CXL 池上提供控制平面和数据路径，跨主机边界映射和路由 PCIe 设备流量。通过为每个设备类别添加 Oasis 引擎，可以支持具有不同功能的 PCIe 设备。我们实现了 Oasis 网络引擎来演示 NIC 池。我们的评估表明，Oasis 将 NIC 利用率提高了 2 倍，并且处理 NIC 故障转移时仅出现 38 毫秒的中断。

papers.title: Optimistic Recovery for High-Availability Software via Partial Process State Preservation.
papers.abstract:
Achieving high availability for modern software requires fast and correct recovery from inevitable faults. This is notoriously difficult. Existing techniques either guarantee correctness by discarding all state but suffer from long downtime, or preserve all state to recover quickly but reintroduce the fault.

We present Phoenix, a framework that enables a new design point of optimistic custom recovery for high-availability software through partial process state preservation. Phoenixmode recovery allows an application to selectively preserve long-lived state, discard transient state, and reset the execution. In the common cases, it combines the effectiveness of full restart with the speed of state reuse. Phoenix offers simple APIs for annotation, supports consistency checks via unsafe region detection, and provides cross-checking validation with default recovery paths for strong correctness. We implement Phoenix in Linux kernel and apply it on six large server applications. Our extensive evaluation of real bugs and fault injection testing shows that Phoenix recovery significantly improves availability while not sacrificing correctness.
papers.abstract_zh:
实现现代软件的高可用性需要从不可避免的故障中快速、正确地恢复。这是众所周知的困难。现有技术要么通过丢弃所有状态来保证正确性，但会遭受较长的停机时间，要么保留所有状态以快速恢复，但会重新引入故障。

我们提出了 Phoenix，一个框架，它通过部分进程状态保存实现了高可用性软件的乐观自定义恢复的新设计点。 Phoenixmode 恢复允许应用程序有选择地保留长期状态、丢弃瞬态并重置执行。在常见情况下，它结合了完全重启的有效性和状态重用的速度。 Phoenix 提供简单的注释 API，支持通过不安全区域检测进行一致性检查，并提供与默认恢复路径的交叉检查验证以实现强大的正确性。我们在Linux内核中实现了Phoenix，并将其应用于六个大型服务器应用程序。我们对真实错误和故障注入测试的广泛评估表明，Phoenix 恢复显着提高了可用性，同时又不牺牲正确性。

papers.title: ORQ: Complex Analytics on Private Data with Strong Security Guarantees.
papers.abstract:
We present Orq, a system that enables collaborative analysis of large private datasets using cryptographically secure multi-party computation (MPC). Orq protects data against semi-honest or malicious parties and can efficiently evaluate relational queries with multi-way joins and aggregations that have been considered notoriously expensive under MPC. To do so, Orq eliminates the quadratic cost of secure joins by leveraging the fact that, in practice, the structure of many real queries allows us to join records and apply the aggregations "on the fly" while keeping the result size bounded. On the system side, Orq contributes generic oblivious operators, a data-parallel vectorized query engine, a communication layer that amortizes MPC network costs, and a dataflow API for expressing relational analytics—all built from the ground up.

We evaluate Orq in LAN and WAN deployments on a diverse set of workloads, including complex queries with multiple joins and custom aggregations. When compared to state-of-the-art solutions, Orq significantly reduces MPC execution times and can process one order of magnitude larger datasets. For our most challenging workload, the full TPC-H benchmark, we report results entirely under MPC with Scale Factor 10—a scale that had previously been achieved only with information leakage or the use of trusted compute.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们推出了 Orq，这是一个能够使用加密安全多方计算 (MPC) 对大型私有数据集进行协作分析的系统。 Orq 可以保护数据免受半诚实或恶意方的侵害，并且可以通过多路联接和聚合有效地评估关系查询，而这些在 MPC 下被认为是非常昂贵的。为此，Orq 利用以下事实消除了安全连接的二次成本：在实践中，许多实际查询的结构允许我们“动态”连接记录并应用聚合，同时保持结果大小有限。在系统方面，Orq 提供了通用的不经意运算符、数据并行矢量化查询引擎、分摊 MPC 网络成本的通信层以及用于表达关系分析的数据流 API，所有这些都是从头开始构建的。

我们在不同的工作负载上评估 LAN 和 WAN 部署中的 Orq，包括具有多个联接和自定义聚合的复杂查询。与最先进的解决方案相比，Orq 显着减少了 MPC 执行时间，并且可以处理大一个数量级的数据集。对于我们最具挑战性的工作负载，即完整的 TPC-H 基准测试，我们完全在比例因子 10 的 MPC 下报告结果，这一比例以前只能通过信息泄漏或使用可信计算来实现。

papers.title: Orthrus: Efficient and Timely Detection of Silent User Data Corruption in the Cloud with Resource-Adaptive Computation Validation.
papers.abstract: Even with substantial endeavors to test and validate processors, computational errors may still arise post-installation. One particular category of CPU errors transpires discreetly, without crashing applications or triggering hardware warnings. These elusive errors pose a significant threat by undermining user data, and their detection is challenging. This paper introduces Orthrus, a solution for the timely detection of silent user data corruption caused by post-installation CPU errors. Orthrus safeguards user data in cloud applications by providing simple annotations and compiler support for users to identify data operators and validating these operators asynchronously across cores while maintaining a low overhead (2%–6%), making it practical for production deployment. Our evaluation, using carefully injected errors, demonstrates that Orthrus can detect 87% of data corruptions with just a single core dedicated to validation, increasing to 91% and 96% when two and four cores are used, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 即使付出了大量努力来测试和验证处理器，安装后仍然可能出现计算错误。一类特定的 CPU 错误会悄悄发生，不会导致应用程序崩溃或触发硬件警告。这些难以捉摸的错误会破坏用户数据，从而构成重大威胁，并且它们的检测具有挑战性。本文介绍了 Orthrus，这是一种及时检测由安装后 CPU 错误导致的无提示用户数据损坏的解决方案。 Orthrus 通过为用户提供简单的注释和编译器支持来识别数据运算符并跨内核异步验证这些运算符，同时保持较低的开销 (2%–6%)，从而保护云应用程序中的用户数据，使其适用于生产部署。我们使用仔细注入的错误进行的评估表明，Orthrus 只需一个专用于验证的核心即可检测到 87% 的数据损坏，当使用两个和四个核心时，分别增加到 91% 和 96%。

papers.title: Pesto: Cooking up High Performance BFT Queries.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Pesto, a high-performance Byzantine Fault Tolerant (BFT) database that offers full SQL compatibility. Pesto intentionally forgoes the use of State Machine Replication (SMR); SMR-based designs offer poor performance due to the several round trips required to order transactions. Pesto, instead, allows for replicas to remain inconsistent, and only synchronizes on demand to ensure that the database remain serializable in the presence of concurrent transactions and malicious actors. On TPC-C, Pesto matches the throughput of Peloton [20] and Postgres [21], two unreplicated SQL database systems, while increasing throughput by 2.3x compared to classic SMR-based BFT-architectures, and reducing latency by 2.7x to 3.9x. Pesto's leaderless design minimizes the impact of replica failures and ensures robust performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Pesto，这是一种高性能拜占庭容错 (BFT) 数据库，提供完全的 SQL 兼容性。 Pesto 有意放弃使用状态机复制 (SMR)；由于排序事务需要多次往返，基于 SMR 的设计性能较差。相反，Pesto 允许副本保持不一致，并且仅按需同步，以确保数据库在存在并发事务和恶意行为者的情况下保持可序列化。在 TPC-C 上，Pesto 与 Peloton [20] 和 Postgres [21] 这两个非复制 SQL 数据库系统的吞吐量相匹配，同时与经典的基于 SMR 的 BFT 架构相比，吞吐量提高了 2.3 倍，并将延迟降低了 2.7 倍到 3.9 倍。 Pesto 的无领导者设计最大限度地减少了副本故障的影响并确保了稳健的性能。

papers.title: PhoenixOS: Concurrent OS-level GPU Checkpoint and Restore with Validated Speculation.
papers.abstract:
PhoenixOS (PhOS) is the first OS service that can concurrently checkpoint and restore (C/R) GPU processes—a fundamental capability for critical tasks such as fault tolerance, process migration, and fast startup. While concurrent C/R is well-established on CPUs, it poses unique challenges on GPUs due to their lack of essential features for efficiently tracing concurrent memory reads and writes, such as specific hardware capabilities (e.g., dirty bits) and OS-mediated data paths (e.g., copy-on-write).

To ensure correct concurrent C/R, PhOS proactively detects GPU memory reads and writes through a two-step process: first, it speculates about GPU memory accesses based on the arguments used when launching GPU kernels; then, it validates these accesses efficiently at runtime using binary instrumentation. With this validated speculation, PhOS retrofits CPU-based concurrent C/R for GPUs through software-based approaches, including soft copy-on-write, soft recopy, and soft on-demand restore. PhOS further proposes several GPU-aware techniques for efficient GPU C/R, including coordinated checkpoint data transfer and execution context pool. For downstream tasks that use C/R for tolerating failures, migrating processes between machines, and accelerating cold starts in serverless computing, PhOS achieves orders of magnitude higher performance than state-of-the-art OS-level GPU C/R systems like NVIDIA cuda-checkpoint.
papers.abstract_zh:
PhoenixOS (PhOS) 是第一个可以同时检查点和恢复 (C/R) GPU 进程的操作系统服务，这是容错、进程迁移和快速启动等关键任务的基本功能。虽然并发 C/R 在 CPU 上已经很成熟，但它对 GPU 提出了独特的挑战，因为它们缺乏有效跟踪并发内存读写的基本功能，例如特定的硬件功能（例如脏位）和操作系统介导的数据路径（例如写入时复制）。

为了确保正确的并发 C/R，PhOS 通过两步过程主动检测 GPU 内存读写：首先，它根据启动 GPU 内核时使用的参数推测 GPU 内存访问；然后，它使用二进制检测在运行时有效地验证这些访问。根据这一经过验证的推测，PhOS 通过基于软件的方法（包括写入时软复制、软重新复制和软按需恢复）改进了 GPU 的基于 CPU 的并发 C/R。 PhOS 进一步提出了几种用于高效 GPU C/R 的 GPU 感知技术，包括协调检查点数据传输和执行上下文池。对于使用 C/R 来容忍故障、在机器之间迁移进程以及加速无服务器计算中的冷启动的下游任务，PhOS 的性能比 NVIDIA cuda-checkpoint 等最先进的操作系统级 GPU C/R 系统高出几个数量级。

papers.title: Pie: A Programmable Serving System for Emerging LLM Applications.
papers.abstract: Emerging large language model (LLM) applications involve diverse reasoning strategies and agentic workflows, straining the capabilities of existing serving systems built on a monolithic token generation loop. This paper introduces Pie, a programmable LLM serving system designed for flexibility and efficiency. Pie decomposes the traditional generation loop into fine-grained service handlers exposed via an API and delegates control of the generation process to user-provided programs, called inferlets. This enables applications to implement new KV cache strategies, bespoke generation logic, and seamlessly integrate computation and I/O—entirely within the application, without requiring modifications to the serving system. Pie executes inferlets using WebAssembly, benefiting from its lightweight sandboxing. Our evaluation shows Pie matches state-of-the-art performance on standard tasks (3-12% latency overhead) while significantly improving latency and throughput (1.3×-3.4× higher) on agentic workflows by enabling application-specific optimizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的大型语言模型（LLM）应用程序涉及不同的推理策略和代理工作流程，这对构建在整体令牌生成循环上的现有服务系统的能力造成了压力。本文介绍了 Pie，一个专为灵活性和效率而设计的可编程法学硕士服务系统。 Pie 将传统的生成循环分解为通过 API 公开的细粒度服务处理程序，并将生成过程的控制权委托给用户提供的程序（称为 inferlet）。这使得应用程序能够实现新的 KV 缓存策略、定制生成逻辑，并完全在应用程序内无缝集成计算和 I/O，而无需修改服务系统。 Pie 使用 WebAssembly 执行 inferlet，受益于其轻量级沙箱。我们的评估表明，Pie 在标准任务上达到了最先进的性能（3-12% 延迟开销），同时通过启用特定于应用程序的优化，显着改善了代理工作流程的延迟和吞吐量（1.3×-3.4×更高）。

papers.title: PrefillOnly: An Inference Engine for Prefill-only Workloads in Large Language Model Applications.
papers.abstract: Besides typical generative applications, like ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor, we observe an emerging trend that LLMs are increasingly used in traditional discriminative tasks, such as recommendation, credit verification, and data labeling. The key characteristic of these emerging use cases is that the LLM generates only a single output token, rather than an arbitrarily long sequence of tokens. We refer to this as a prefill-only workload. However, since existing LLM engines assume arbitrary output lengths, they fail to leverage the unique properties of prefill-only workloads. In this paper, we present PrefillOnly, the first LLM inference engine that improves the inference throughput and latency by fully embracing the properties of prefill-only workloads.
