First, since it generates only one token, PrefillOnly only needs to store the KV cache of only the last computed layer, rather than of all layers. This drastically reduces the GPU memory footprint of LLM inference and allows handling long inputs without using solutions that reduce throughput, such as cross-GPU KV cache parallelization. Second, because the output length is fixed, rather than arbitrary, PrefillOnly can precisely determine the job completion time (JCT) of each prefill-only request before it starts. This enables efficient JCT-aware scheduling policies such as shortest prefill first. PrefillOnly can process up to 4× larger queries per second without inflating the average and P99 latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 除了 ChatGPT、GitHub Copilot 和 Cursor 等典型的生成应用程序之外，我们还观察到一个新兴趋势，即 LLM 越来越多地用于传统的判别性任务，例如推荐、信用验证和数据标记。这些新兴用例的关键特征是 LLM 仅生成单个输出令牌，而不是任意长的令牌序列。我们将此称为仅预填充工作负载。然而，由于现有的 LLM 引擎假定任意输出长度，因此它们无法利用仅预填充工作负载的独特属性。在本文中，我们提出了 PrefillOnly，这是第一个 LLM 推理引擎，它通过完全采用仅预填充工作负载的属性来提高推理吞吐量和延迟。首先，由于它只生成一个令牌，PrefillOnly 只需要存储最后计算层的 KV 缓存，而不是所有层的 KV 缓存。这大大减少了 LLM 推理的 GPU 内存占用，并允许处理长输入，而无需使用降低吞吐量的解决方案，例如跨 GPU KV 缓存并行化。其次，由于输出长度是固定的，而不是任意的，PrefillOnly 可以在每个仅预填充请求开始之前精确确定其作业完成时间（JCT）。这可以实现高效的 JCT 感知调度策略，例如最短预填充优先。 PrefillOnly 每秒最多可以处理 4 倍大的查询，而不会增加平均延迟和 P99 延迟。

papers.title: Proto: A Guided Journey through Modern OS Construction.
papers.abstract:
Proto is a new instructional OS that runs on commodity, portable hardware. It showcases modern features, including per-app address spaces, threading, commodity filesystems, USB, DMA, multicore support, self-hosted debugging, and a window manager. It supports rich applications such as 2D/3D games, music and video players, and a blockchain miner. Unlike traditional instructional systems, Proto emphasizes engaging, media-rich apps that go beyond basic terminal programs. Our method breaks down a full-featured OS into a set of incremental, self-contained prototypes. Each prototype introduces a minimal set of OS mechanisms, driven by the needs of specific apps. The construction process then progressively enables these apps by bringing up one mechanism at a time.

Proto enables a wider audience to experience building a self-contained software system used in daily life.
papers.abstract_zh:
Proto 是一种新的教学操作系统，可在商用便携式硬件上运行。它展示了现代功能，包括每个应用程序地址空间、线程、商品文件系统、USB、DMA、多核支持、自托管调试和窗口管理器。它支持2D/3D游戏、音乐和视频播放器、区块链矿工等丰富的应用程序。与传统的教学系统不同，Proto 强调引人入胜、媒体丰富的应用程序，超越基本的终端程序。我们的方法将功能齐全的操作系统分解为一组增量的、独立的原型。每个原型都引入了一组最小的操作系统机制，由特定应用程序的需求驱动。然后，构建过程通过一次启动一种机制来逐步启用这些应用程序。

Proto 使更广泛的受众能够体验构建日常生活中使用的独立软件系统。

papers.title: Prove It to the Kernel: Precise Extension Analysis via Proof-Guided Abstraction Refinement.
papers.abstract:
Modern OS kernels, such as Linux, employ the eBPF subsystem to enable user space to extend kernel functionality. To ensure safety, an in-kernel verifier statically analyzes these extensions; however, its imprecise analysis frequently results in the erroneous rejection of safe extensions, exposing a critical tension between the precision and computational complexity of the verifier that limits kernel extensibility.

We propose a proof-guided abstraction refinement technique that significantly enhances the verifier's precision while preserving low kernel space complexity. Rather than incorporating sophisticated analysis ( e.g. , via new abstract domains) directly into the verifier, our key insight is to decouple the complex reasoning to user space while bridging the gap through formal proofs. Upon encountering uncertainties, the verifier initiates an abstraction refinement procedure rather than rejecting the extension. As the refinement involves nontrivial reasoning, the verifier simply delineates the task and delegates it to user space. A formal proof is produced externally, which the verifier subsequently checks in linear time before adopting the refined abstraction. Consequently, our approach achieves high precision via user space reasoning while confining kernel space operations to an efficient proof check. Evaluation results show that our technique enables the verifier to accept 403 out of 512 real-world eBPF programs that were previously rejected erroneously, paving the way for more reliable and flexible kernel extensions.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代操作系统内核（例如 Linux）采用 eBPF 子系统来使用户空间能够扩展内核功能。为了确保安全，内核验证器对这些扩展进行静态分析；然而，其不精确的分析经常导致错误地拒绝安全扩展，暴露了验证器的精度和计算复杂性之间的关键张力，从而限制了内核的可扩展性。

我们提出了一种以证明为导向的抽象细化技术，可以显着提高验证者的精度，同时保持较低的内核空间复杂性。我们的主要见解不是将复杂的分析（例如，通过新的抽象域）直接合并到验证器中，而是将复杂的推理与用户空间解耦，同时通过形式证明弥合差距。当遇到不确定性时，验证者会启动抽象细化过程，而不是拒绝扩展。由于细化涉及重要的推理，验证者只需描述任务并将其委托给用户空间。外部生成正式证明，验证者随后在采用精炼抽象之前以线性时间对其进行检查。因此，我们的方法通过用户空间推理实现了高精度，同时将内核空间操作限制为有效的证明检查。评估结果表明，我们的技术使验证者能够接受之前被错误拒绝的 512 个真实 eBPF 程序中的 403 个，为更可靠、更灵活的内核扩展铺平了道路。

papers.title: Quilt: Resource-aware Merging of Serverless Workflows.
papers.abstract: This paper describes Quilt, a serverless optimizer that automatically merges workflows that consist of many functions (possibly in different languages) into one process thereby avoiding high invocation latency, communication overhead, and long chains of cold starts. Instead of merging all functions, Quilt takes into account the provider's resource constraints to decide which functions to merge. Quilt is compatible with existing platforms without modification (Fission, OpenWhisk, and OpenFaaS), can merge functions in different languages (C, C++, Swift, Go, Rust) by acting at the level of LLVM IR, and requires no input or help from developers. Our evaluation shows that Quilt improves median workflow completion time by 45.63%–70.95% and throughput by 2.05×–12.87×.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Quilt，一种无服务器优化器，它自动将由许多函数（可能采用不同语言）组成的工作流合并到一个进程中，从而避免高调用延迟、通信开销和长冷启动链。 Quilt 不是合并所有函数，而是考虑提供者的资源限制来决定合并哪些函数。 Quilt 无需修改即可兼容现有平台（Fission、OpenWhisk 和 OpenFaaS），可以通过作用于 LLVM IR 级别来合并不同语言（C、C++、Swift、Go、Rust）的功能，并且不需要开发人员的输入或帮助。我们的评估表明，Quilt 将工作流程中值完成时间提高了 45.63%–70.95%，吞吐量提高了 2.05×–12.87×。

papers.title: Rearchitecting the Thread Model of In-Memory Key-Value Stores with μTPS.
papers.abstract: This paper presents μTPS, a new thread architecture tailored for in-memory key-value stores (KVSs) that operate at tens of millions of operations per second. We show through analysis and demonstration that the widely used run-to-completion thread architecture, which executes monolithic functions from start to finish, often suffers from cache inefficiencies and contention issues. To address this, we revisit the once widely used thread-per-stage (TPS) architecture, but with a fresh perspective – separating cache-resident, contention-free stages and memory-resident, conflict-prone stages into distinct thread pools, and scheduling them with dedicated hardware resources (e.g., CPU cores, cache ways). This novel division enables independent optimization of each stage, significantly improving cache efficiency and mitigating contention. Additionally, μTPS incorporates reconfigurable RPC, resizable caching, and an auto-tuner to enhance its schedulability and performance. We implement two in-memory key-value stores, μTPS-H and μTPS-T, to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. Evaluation results show that μTPS achieves higher performance than the run-to-completion counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 μTPS，这是一种专为内存中键值存储 (KVS) 量身定制的新线程架构，每秒可进行数千万次操作。我们通过分析和演示表明，广泛使用的运行到完成线程架构（从头到尾执行整体函数）经常遭受缓存效率低下和争用问题。为了解决这个问题，我们重新审视曾经广泛使用的每阶段线程 (TPS) 架构，但采用了全新的视角——将驻留在缓存、无争用的阶段和驻留在内存、易发生冲突的阶段分离到不同的线程池中，并使用专用硬件资源（例如 CPU 核心、缓存通道）来调度它们。这种新颖的划分可以实现每个阶段的独立优化，从而显着提高缓存效率并减少争用。此外，μTPS 还结合了可重新配置的 RPC、可调整大小的缓存和自动调节器，以增强其可调度性和性能。我们实现了两个内存中键值存储：μTPS-H 和μTPS-T，以证明这种方法的有效性。评估结果表明，μTPS 比运行到完成的同类产品实现了更高的性能。

papers.title: Robust LLM Training Infrastructure at ByteDance.
papers.abstract: The training scale of large language models (LLMs) has reached tens of thousands of GPUs and is still continuously expanding, enabling faster learning of larger models. Accompanying the expansion of the resource scale is the prevalence of failures (CUDA error, NaN values, job hang, etc. ), which poses significant challenges to training stability. Any large-scale LLM training infrastructure should strive for minimal training interruption, efficient fault diagnosis, and effective failure tolerance to enable highly efficient continuous training. This paper presents ByteRobust, a large-scale GPU infrastructure management system tailored for robust and stable training of LLMs. It exploits the uniqueness of LLM training process and gives top priorities to detecting and recovering failures in a routine manner. Leveraging parallelisms and characteristics of LLM training, ByteRobust enables high-capacity fault tolerance, prompt fault demarcation, and localization with an effective data-driven approach, comprehensively ensuring continuous and efficient training of LLM tasks. ByteRobust is deployed on a production GPU platform and advances the state of the art in training robustness by achieving 97% ETTR for a three-month training job on 9,600 GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的训练规模已达到数万个 GPU，并且仍在不断扩大，从而能够更快地学习更大的模型。伴随资源规模的扩大，故障（CUDA错误、NaN值、作业挂起等）普遍存在，这对训练稳定性提出了重大挑战。任何大规模的LLM培训基础设施都应该努力实现最小的培训中断、高效的故障诊断和有效的容错，以实现高效的连续培训。本文介绍了 ByteRobust，这是一种专为法学硕士的鲁棒和稳定训练而定制的大规模 GPU 基础设施管理系统。它利用了法学硕士培训过程的独特性，并将以常规方式检测和恢复故障作为首要任务。 ByteRobust利用LLM训练的并行性和特点，通过有效的数据驱动方法实现大容量容错、快速故障定界和定位，全面保障LLM任务训练的持续高效。 ByteRobust 部署在生产 GPU 平台上，通过在 9,600 个 GPU 上进行为期三个月的训练作业实现 97% 的 ETTR，从而提高了训练稳健性的最先进水平。

papers.title: Running Consistent Applications Closer to Users with Radical for Lower Latency.
papers.abstract: Running applications close to users—in nearby datacenters, at edge points of presence, or in on-premises clusters—is attractive, as it reduces end-to-end latency. Moving strong consistent applications closer to users is difficult, as they incur high latencies either when accessing, or coordinating, their storage system. This restricts such applications to running co-located with their data, in a datacenter. Radical allows these applications to leverage the latency benefits that come from running near users. Radical uses its new LVI protocol to perform all necessary coordination in a single request. This request guarantees linearizability with a combination of locks, a validation step, and write intents. Radical hides the latency of the LVI request by overlapping it with speculative execution of the application. Our evaluation shows that Radical achieves 84–89% of the latency improvement obtainable by moving out of the datacenter, while providing Linearizability.
papers.abstract_zh: 在靠近用户的位置（在附近的数据中心、边缘点或本地集群中）运行应用程序很有吸引力，因为它可以减少端到端延迟。将强一致的应用程序移至更靠近用户的位置是很困难的，因为它们在访问或协调其存储系统时会产生高延迟。这限制了此类应用程序与其数据一起在数据中心运行。 Radical 允许这些应用程序利用在用户附近运行所带来的延迟优势。 Radical 使用其新的 LVI 协议在单个请求中执行所有必要的协调。此请求通过锁、验证步骤和写入意图的组合来保证线性化。 Radical 通过将 LVI 请求与应用程序的推测执行重叠来隐藏 LVI 请求的延迟。我们的评估表明，Radical 实现了通过移出数据中心可获得的 84-89% 的延迟改善，同时提供了线性化能力。

papers.title: Sailor: Automating Distributed Training over Dynamic, Heterogeneous, and Geo-distributed Clusters.
papers.abstract: The high GPU demand of ML training makes it hard to allocate large homogeneous clusters of high-end GPUs in a single availability zone. Leveraging heterogeneous GPUs available within and across zones can improve throughput at a reasonable cost. However, training ML models on heterogeneous resources introduces significant challenges, such as stragglers and a large search space of possible job configurations. Current systems lack support for efficiently training models on heterogeneous resources. We present Sailor, a system that automates distributed training over heterogeneous, geo-distributed, and dynamically available resources. Sailor combines an efficient search space exploration algorithm, accurate runtime and memory footprint simulation, and a distributed training framework that supports different types of heterogeneity to optimize training throughput and cost.
papers.abstract_zh: ML 训练对 GPU 的高需求使得很难在单个可用区中分配大型同质高端 GPU 集群。利用区域内和跨区域可用的异构 GPU 可以以合理的成本提高吞吐量。然而，在异构资源上训练 ML 模型会带来重大挑战，例如落后者和可能作业配置的巨大搜索空间。当前的系统缺乏对异构资源上有效训练模型的支持。我们推出了 Sailor，这是一个通过异构、地理分布式和动态可用资源自动进行分布式训练的系统。 Sailor 结合了高效的搜索空间探索算法、精确的运行时和内存占用模拟以及支持不同类型异构性的分布式训练框架，以优化训练吞吐量和成本。

papers.title: SAND: A New Programming Abstraction for Video-based Deep Learning.
papers.abstract:
Video-based deep learning (VDL) is increasingly used across diverse applications and has become highly popular, but it faces significant challenges in preprocessing highly compressed video data. Preprocessing pipelines are complex, requiring extensive engineering effort, and introduce computational bottlenecks, with latency exceeding GPU training time. Existing solutions partially mitigate these issues but remain inefficient and resource-constrained.

We present SAND, a framework for VDL that integrates system-level optimizations to simplify the preprocessing pipeline and maximize resource efficiency. First, SAND introduces a view abstraction that encapsulates key preprocessing stages into virtualized objects, eliminating the need for users to manage individual objects. Second, SAND maximizes reuse opportunities through efficient system-level object management, reducing the preprocessing overhead and improving GPU utilization. Evaluation across multiple VDL applications and diverse environments, including Ray-based hyperparameter search and distributed data parallel training, shows GPU utilization improvements of up to 12.3× and 2.9× over CPU and GPU baselines, respectively, while reducing preprocessing code complexity from hundreds or thousands of lines to fewer than 10.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于视频的深度学习（VDL）越来越多地在各种应用中使用，并且变得非常流行，但它在预处理高度压缩的视频数据方面面临着巨大的挑战。预处理管道很复杂，需要大量的工程工作，并且会引入计算瓶颈，延迟超过 GPU 训练时间。现有的解决方案部分缓解了这些问题，但仍然效率低下且资源有限。

我们提出了 SAND，这是一个 VDL 框架，它集成了系统级优化，以简化预处理管道并最大限度地提高资源效率。首先，SAND 引入了视图抽象，将关键预处理阶段封装到虚拟化对象中，从而消除了用户管理单个对象的需要。其次，SAND 通过高效的系统级对象管理最大限度地提高重用机会，减少预处理开销并提高 GPU 利用率。对多个 VDL 应用程序和不同环境（包括基于 Ray 的超参数搜索和分布式数据并行训练）的评估显示，与 CPU 和 GPU 基线相比，GPU 利用率分别提高了 12.3 倍和 2.9 倍，同时将预处理代码复杂性从数百或数千行降低到不到 10 行。

papers.title: Scalable Address Spaces using Concurrent Interval Skiplist.
papers.abstract:
A kernel's address space design can significantly bottleneck multi-threaded applications, as address space operations such as mmap() and munmap() are serialized by coarsegrained locks like Linux's mmap_lock. Such locks have long been known as one of the most intractable contention points in memory management. While prior works have attempted to address this issue, they either fail to sufficiently parallelize operations or are impractical for real-world kernels.

We present the first scalable and practical address space design that parallelizes critical operations. We identify key scalability bottlenecks—many of which extend beyond address spaces—and address them with targeted solutions. At its core is the concurrent interval skiplist , a new data structure that integrates mapping and locking for parallel interval operations. We implement our design on Linux 6.8 and evaluate it on a dual-socket 48-core machine. Our results show a significant throughput improvement of 13.1× for an mmap() microbenchmark, 4.49× for LevelDB, 3.19× for the Apache web server, 1.47× for Metis MapReduce, and 1.27× for Psearchy text indexing.
papers.abstract_zh:
内核的地址空间设计可能会严重成为多线程应用程序的瓶颈，因为诸如 mmap() 和 munmap() 之类的地址空间操作是通过粗粒度锁（如 Linux 的 mmap_lock）进行序列化的。长期以来，此类锁一直被认为是内存管理中最棘手的争用点之一。虽然之前的工作已经尝试解决这个问题，但它们要么无法充分并行化操作，要么对于现实世界的内核来说不切实际。

我们提出了第一个可并行化关键操作的可扩展且实用的地址空间设计。我们确定了关键的可扩展性瓶颈（其中许多瓶颈超出了地址空间），并通过有针对性的解决方案来解决它们。其核心是并发间隔跳表，这是一种集成了并行间隔操作的映射和锁定的新数据结构。我们在 Linux 6.8 上实现了我们的设计，并在双路 48 核机器上对其进行了评估。我们的结果显示，mmap() 微基准的吞吐量显着提高了 13.1 倍，LevelDB 提高了 4.49 倍，Apache Web 服务器提高了 3.19 倍，Metis MapReduce 提高了 1.47 倍，Psearchy 文本索引提高了 1.27 倍。

papers.title: Scalable Far Memory: Balancing Faults and Evictions.
papers.abstract:
Page-based far memory systems transparently expand an application's memory capacity beyond a single machine without modifying application code. However, existing systems are tailored to scenarios with low application thread counts, and fail to scale on today's multi-core machines. This makes them unsuitable for data-intensive applications that both rely on far memory support and scale with increasing thread count. Our analysis reveals that this poor scalability stems from inefficient holistic coordination between page fault-in and eviction operations. As thread count increases, current systems encounter scalability bottlenecks in TLB shootdowns, page accounting, and memory allocation.

This paper presents three design principles that address these scalability challenges and enable efficient memory offloading. These principles are always-asynchronous decoupling to handle eviction operations as asynchronously as possible, cross-batch pipelined execution to avoid idle waiting periods, and scalability prioritization to avoid synchronization overheads at high thread counts at the cost of eviction accuracy. We implement these principles in both the Linux kernel and a library OS. Our evaluation shows that this approach increases throughput for batch-processing applications by up to 4.2× and reduces 99 th percentile latency for a latency-critical memcached application by 94.5%.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于页面的远内存系统可以透明地将应用程序的内存容量扩展到单台机器之外，而无需修改应用程序代码。然而，现有系统是针对应用程序线程数较低的场景量身定制的，无法在当今的多核机器上进行扩展。这使得它们不适合数据密集型应用程序，这些应用程序既依赖远内存支持，又随着线程数量的增加而扩展。我们的分析表明，这种糟糕的可扩展性源于页面错误和逐出操作之间低效的整体协调。随着线程数量的增加，当前系统在 TLB 关闭、页面统计和内存分配方面遇到了可扩展性瓶颈。

本文提出了三个设计原则，可解决这些可扩展性挑战并实现高效的内存卸载。这些原则是始终异步解耦，以尽可能异步地处理逐出操作，跨批次流水线执行，以避免空闲等待期，以及可扩展性优先级，以避免高线程数下的同步开销，但以逐出精度为代价。我们在 Linux 内核和库操作系统中实现了这些原则。我们的评估表明，这种方法可将批处理应用程序的吞吐量提高高达 4.2 倍，并将延迟关键型 Memcached 应用程序的 99% 延迟降低 94.5%。

papers.title: Sleeping with One Eye Open: Fast, Sustainable Storage with Sandman.
papers.abstract: All-flash servers, while being widely popular for their high performance and large capacity, can incur significant energy consumption in modern storage systems. Through a motivational study, we discover that the culprit is the inefficiency in the software stack, and existing power-saving methods fail to deliver comparable performance, especially under workload bursts. Guided by the lessons learned, we propose Sandman, a scheduling framework that combines the fast resource scaling mechanism, resource monitoring, and I/O burst detection policies. Experiments show that Sandman reduces average power consumption by up to 39.38% and energy consumption by up to 33.36% while delivering performance comparable (within 5% in corner cases) to the best performance case (the busy-polling stack) in both benchmarks and field workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 全闪存服务器虽然因其高性能和大容量而广受欢迎，但在现代存储系统中也会产生大量的能源消耗。通过动机研究，我们发现罪魁祸首是软件堆栈的低效率，而现有的节能方法无法提供可比的性能，尤其是在工作负载突发的情况下。在经验教训的指导下，我们提出了Sandman，一个结合了快速资源扩展机制、资源监控和I/O突发检测策略的调度框架。实验表明，Sandman 将平均功耗降低了 39.38%，能耗降低了 33.36%，同时在基准测试和现场工作负载中提供了与最佳性能情况（繁忙轮询堆栈）相当的性能（在极端情况下在 5% 以内）。

papers.title: Spirit: Fair Allocation of Interdependent Resources in Remote Memory Systems.
papers.abstract:
We address the problem of fair resource allocation in multiuser remote memory systems. Allocating local memory (used as cache ) and network bandwidth to remote memory in such systems is challenging due to the complex interdependence between the two resources and application performance. A larger cache may reduce the need for fetching data over the network, while a larger bandwidth may permit more concurrent network requests, avoiding the need for large caches. As a result, applications can achieve the same data access throughput for a wide range of cache and bandwidth allocations. Such interdependence is unique to each application and hard to capture offline.

We propose Spirit, a multi-user framework for fair resource allocation in remote memory systems. Spirit employs a novel Symbiosis algorithm rooted in microeconomic theory that takes application-specific dependency between cache and network bandwidth into account and 'trades' cache and bandwidth resources across users at runtime. We show, both theoretically and empirically, that Symbiosis allocations across users achieve strong fairness properties. Additionally, compared to traditional resource allocation schemes, Spirit improves performance by up to 21.6% across tens of real-world applications with diverse resource needs.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们解决多用户远程存储系统中公平资源分配的问题。由于两种资源和应用程序性能之间复杂的相互依赖关系，在此类系统中将本地内存（用作缓存）和网络带宽分配给远程内存具有挑战性。较大的缓存可以减少通过网络获取数据的需要，而较大的带宽可以允许更多并发网络请求，从而避免对大型缓存的需要。因此，应用程序可以在各种缓存和带宽分配下实现相同的数据访问吞吐量。这种相互依赖性对于每个应用程序来说都是独特的，并且很难离线捕获。

我们提出了 Spirit，一个用于远程内存系统中公平资源分配的多用户框架。 Spirit 采用了一种植根于微观经济理论的新颖共生算法，该算法考虑了缓存和网络带宽之间特定于应用程序的依赖性，并在运行时在用户之间“交换”缓存和带宽资源。我们从理论上和经验上都表明，跨用户的共生分配实现了很强的公平性。此外，与传统的资源分配方案相比，Spirit 在数十个具有不同资源需求的实际应用程序中将性能提高了高达 21.6%。

papers.title: Tai Chi: A General High-Efficiency Scheduling Framework for SmartNICs in Hyperscale Clouds.
papers.abstract:
Cloud service providers increasingly adopt SmartNICs to offload data-plane services (e.g., DPDK and SPDK) and control-plane tasks (such as disk and NIC initialization). Our analysis of production environments reveals that data-plane services statically provision CPUs for peak load, resulting in 67.5% idle CPU cycles during 99% of their runtime in IaaS clouds, leading to wasted CPU resources. On the other hand, control-plane tasks fail to meet critical Service Level Objectives (SLOs), such as virtual machine startup time. Unfortunately, achieving control-plane SLO improvements through co-scheduling with idle data-plane services remains highly challenging, due to the combined effects of intrinsic scheduling latency and the substantial architectural complexity inherent to control-plane ecosystems.

We present Tai Chi, a hardware and software co-designed scheduler that coordinates control-plane tasks and dataplane services through a SmartNIC-accelerated hybrid virtualization. This hybrid framework unifes physical and virtual CPUs within a single OS while providing native inter-process communication semantics among all tasks. By achieving microsecond-scale scheduling precision, it reduces control-plane operation latency by 3.1× (e.g., VM startup) while maintaining data-plane SLO compliance, imposes negligible scheduling overhead, and requires zero code modifications to legacy control-plane systems. Its cross-platform SmartNIC compatibility enables seamless and transparent deployment in the production environment, demonstrating compelling advantages over prior solutions in hyperscale cloud infrastructure.
papers.abstract_zh:
云服务提供商越来越多地采用 SmartNIC 来卸载数据平面服务（例如 DPDK 和 SPDK）和控制平面任务（例如磁盘和 NIC 初始化）。我们对生产环境的分析表明，数据平面服务为峰值负载静态配置 CPU，导致 IaaS 云中 99% 的运行时间中有 67.5% 的 CPU 周期空闲，从而导致 CPU 资源浪费。另一方面，控制平面任务无法满足关键的服务级别目标 (SLO)，例如虚拟机启动时间。不幸的是，由于内在调度延迟和控制平面生态系统固有的架构复杂性的综合影响，通过与空闲数据平面服务共同调度来实现控制平面 SLO 改进仍然非常具有挑战性。

我们推出 Tai Chi，这是一种硬件和软件共同设计的调度程序，可通过 SmartNIC 加速的混合虚拟化来协调控制平面任务和数据平面服务。这种混合框架将物理和虚拟 CPU 统一在单个操作系统中，同时在所有任务之间提供本机进程间通信语义。通过实现微秒级的调度精度，它可以将控制平面操作延迟减少 3.1 倍（例如，虚拟机启动），同时保持数据平面 SLO 合规性，调度开销可以忽略不计，并且需要对遗留控制平面系统进行零代码修改。其跨平台 SmartNIC 兼容性可在生产环境中实现无缝、透明的部署，与超大规模云基础设施中的现有解决方案相比，具有显着的优势。

papers.title: Tempo: Compiled Dynamic Deep Learning with Symbolic Dependence Graphs.
papers.abstract:
Deep learning (DL) algorithms are often defined in terms of temporal relationships : a tensor at one timestep may depend on tensors from earlier or later timesteps. Such dynamic dependencies (and corresponding dynamic tensor shapes) are difficult to express and optimize: while eager DL systems support such dynamism, they cannot apply compiler-based optimizations; graph-based systems require static tensor shapes, which forces users to pad tensors or break-up programs into multiple static graphs.

We describe Tempo, a new DL system that combines the dynamism of eager execution with the whole-program optimizations of graph-based compilation. Tempo achieves this through a declarative programming model with recurrent tensors , which include explicit temporal dimensions. Temporal dimensions can be indexed using symbolic expressions to express dynamic dependencies on past and future tensors. Based on this, Tempo constructs a symbolic dependence graph , which concisely encodes dynamic dependencies between operators, and applies whole-program optimizations, such as algebraic simplifications, vectorization, tiling, and fusion. By tiling dynamic dependencies into static-size blocks, Tempo can also reuse existing static code-generators. It then uses a polyhedral model to find a feasible execution schedule, which includes memory management operations. We show that Tempo achieves a 7× speedup over JAX for Llama-3.2-3B decoding; for reinforcement learning algorithms, Tempo achieves a 54× speedup, with 16× lower peak memory usage.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度学习 (DL) 算法通常根据时间关系来定义：一个时间步长的张量可能取决于较早或较晚时间步长的张量。这种动态依赖关系（以及相应的动态张量形状）很难表达和优化：虽然急切的深度学习系统支持这种动态性，但它们无法应用基于编译器的优化；基于图的系统需要静态张量形状，这迫使用户将张量或分解程序填充到多个静态图中。

我们描述了 Tempo，这是一种新的深度学习系统，它将急切执行的活力与基于图的编译的整个程序优化相结合。 Tempo 通过具有循环张量的声明性编程模型来实现这一点，其中包括显式的时间维度。可以使用符号表达式对时间维度进行索引，以表达对过去和未来张量的动态依赖关系。在此基础上，Tempo 构建了一个符号依赖图，它简洁地编码了算子之间的动态依赖关系，并应用了整个程序的优化，例如代数简化、矢量化、平铺和融合。通过将动态依赖项平铺到静态大小的块中，Tempo 还可以重用现有的静态代码生成器。然后，它使用多面体模型来找到可行的执行计划，其中包括内存管理操作。我们证明 Tempo 在 Llama-3.2-3B 解码方面比 JAX 实现了 7 倍的加速；对于强化学习算法，Tempo 实现了 54 倍的加速，同时峰值内存使用量降低了 16 倍。

papers.title: The Design and Implementation of a Virtual Firmware Monitor.
papers.abstract:
Low level software is often granted high privilege, yet this need not be the case. Although vendor firmware plays a critical role in the operation and management of the machine, most of its functionality does not require unfettered access to security critical software and data. In this paper we demonstrate that vendor firmware can be safely and efficiently deprivileged, decoupling its functionality from isolation enforcement.

We introduce a new class of systems, called virtual firmware monitors , that run unmodified vendor firmware in userspace through software-based virtualization of the highest privilege mode of the application CPU. We describe the implementation of Miralis, a RISC-V virtual firmware monitor, and develop three security policies to protect the OS, enclaves, and confidential VMs from malicious firmware. We verify key components of Miralis, such as instruction emulation and memory protection, through exhaustive symbolic execution. Finally, we demonstrate that Miralis can effectively virtualize unmodified vendor firmware for two hardware platforms with no performance degradation compared to native execution.
papers.abstract_zh:
低级软件通常被授予高权限，但情况并非如此。尽管供应商固件在机器的操作和管理中发挥着关键作用，但其大部分功能并不需要不受限制地访问安全关键软件和数据。在本文中，我们证明可以安全有效地剥夺供应商固件的特权，从而将其功能与隔离执行分离。

我们引入了一类新的系统，称为虚拟固件监视器，它通过应用程序 CPU 最高权限模式的基于软件的虚拟化在用户空间中运行未经修改的供应商固件。我们描述了 Miralis（一种 RISC-V 虚拟固件监视器）的实现，并开发了三种安全策略来保护操作系统、飞地和机密虚拟机免受恶意固件的侵害。我们通过详尽的符号执行来验证 Miralis 的关键组件，例如指令模拟和内存保护。最后，我们证明 Miralis 可以有效地虚拟化两个硬件平台的未修改的供应商固件，与本机执行相比，性能不会下降。

papers.title: TickTock: Verified Isolation in a Production Embedded OS.
papers.abstract: We present a case study formally verifying process isolation in the Tock production microcontroller OS kernel. Tock combines hardware memory protection units and language-level techniques—by writing the kernel in Rust—to enforce isolation between user and kernel code. Our effort to verify Tock's process abstraction unearthed multiple, subtle bugs that broke isolation—many allowing malicious applications to compromise the whole OS. We describe this effort and TickTock, our fork of the Tock operating system kernel that eliminates isolation bugs by construction. TickTock uses Flux, an SMT-based Rust verifier, to formally specify and verify process isolation for all ARMv7-M platforms Tock supports and for three RISC-V 32-bit platforms. Our verification-guided design and implementation led to a new, granular process abstraction that is simpler than Tock's, has formal security guarantees (that are verified in half a minute), and outperforms Tock on certain critical code paths.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个案例研究，正式验证 Tock 生产微控制器操作系统内核中的进程隔离。 Tock 将硬件内存保护单元和语言级技术相结合（通过用 Rust 编写内核）来强制用户和内核代码之间的隔离。我们验证 Tock 进程抽象的努力发现了多个破坏隔离的微妙错误，其中许多错误允许恶意应用程序危害整个操作系统。我们描述了这项工作和 TickTock，我们的 Tock 操作系统内核的分支，通过构造消除了隔离错误。 TickTock 使用 Flux（一种基于 SMT 的 Rust 验证器）来正式指定和验证 Tock 支持的所有 ARMv7-M 平台以及三个 RISC-V 32 位平台的进程隔离。我们以验证为导向的设计和实现带来了一种新的细粒度流程抽象，它比 Tock 更简单，具有正式的安全保证（半分钟内验证），并且在某些关键代码路径上优于 Tock。

papers.title: Tiga: Accelerating Geo-Distributed Transactions with Synchronized Clocks.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Tiga, a new design for geo-replicated and scalable transactional databases such as Google Spanner. Tiga aims to commit transactions within 1 wide-area roundtrip time, or 1 WRTT, for a wide range of scenarios, while maintaining high throughput with minimal computational overhead. Tiga consolidates concurrency control and consensus, completing both strictly serializable execution and consistent replication in a single round. It uses synchronized clocks to proactively order transactions by assigning each a future timestamp at submission. In most cases, transactions arrive at servers before their future timestamps and are serialized according to the designated timestamp, requiring 1 WRTT to commit. In rare cases, transactions are delayed and proactive ordering fails, in which case Tiga falls back to a slow path, committing in 1.5–2 WRTTs. Compared to state-of-the-art solutions, Tiga can commit more transactions at 1-WRTT latency, and incurs much less throughput overhead. Evaluation results show that Tiga outperforms all baselines, achieving 1.3–7.2× higher throughput and 1.4–4.6× lower latency. Tiga is open-sourced at https://github.com/New-Consensus-Concurrency-Control/Tiga.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Tiga，这是一种针对地理复制和可扩展事务数据库（例如 Google Spanner）的新设计。 Tiga 的目标是在 1 个广域往返时间或 1 个 WRTT 内提交事务，适用于各种场景，同时以最小的计算开销保持高吞吐量。 Tiga 整合了并发控制和共识，在单轮中完成了严格的可序列化执行和一致复制。它使用同步时钟通过在提交时为每个事务分配一个未来时间戳来主动排序事务。在大多数情况下，事务在未来时间戳之前到达服务器，并根据指定时间戳进行序列化，需要 1 WRTT 才能提交。在极少数情况下，交易会延迟并且主动排序失败，在这种情况下，Tiga 会退回到慢速路径，在 1.5-2 WRTT 内提交。与最先进的解决方案相比，Tiga 可以以 1-WRTT 延迟提交更多事务，并且产生的吞吐量开销要少得多。评估结果表明，Tiga 的性能优于所有基线，吞吐量提高了 1.3–7.2 倍，延迟降低了 1.4–4.6 倍。 Tiga 在 https://github.com/New-Consensus-Concurrency-Control/Tiga 上开源。

papers.title: Tock: From Research To Securing 10 Million Computers.
papers.abstract: Tock began 10 years ago as a research operating system developed by academics to help other academics build urban sensing applications. By leveraging a new language (Rust) and new hardware protection mechanisms, Tock enabled "Multiprogramming a 64 kB Computer Safely and Efficiently". Today, it is an open-source project with a vibrant community of users and contributors. It is deployed on root-of-trust hardware in data-center servers and on millions of laptops; it is used to develop automotive and space products, wearable electronics, and hardware security tokens—all while remaining a platform for operating systems research. This paper focuses on the impact of Tock's technical design on its adoption, the challenges and unexpected benefits of using a type-safe language (Rust)—particularly in security-sensitive settings—and the experience of supporting a production open-source operating system from academia.
papers.abstract_zh: Tock 于 10 年前开始作为一个由学者开发的研究操作系统，旨在帮助其他学者构建城市传感应用程序。通过利用新语言 (Rust) 和新的硬件保护机制，Tock 实现了“安全高效地对 64 kB 计算机进行多道编程”。如今，它是一个开源项目，拥有充满活力的用户和贡献者社区。它部署在数据中心服务器的信任根硬件和数百万台笔记本电脑上；它用于开发汽车和航天产品、可穿戴电子产品和硬件安全令牌，同时仍然是操作系统研究的平台。本文重点介绍了 Tock 的技术设计对其采用的影响、使用类型安全语言 (Rust) 的挑战和意想不到的好处（特别是在安全敏感的设置中）以及学术界支持生产开源操作系统的经验。

papers.title: TrainVerify: Equivalence-Based Verification for Distributed LLM Training.
papers.abstract:
Training large language models (LLMs) at scale requires parallel execution across thousands of devices, incurring enormous computational costs. Yet, these costly distributed trainings are prone to correctness bugs, causing silent errors and potentially wasting millions of GPU hours. These bugs are challenging to expose through testing.

We introduce TrainVerify, a system for verifiable distributed training of LLMs to eliminate parallelization bugs. Given a deep learning model's logical specification as the ground truth, TrainVerify formally verifies that a distributed parallel execution plan is mathematically equivalent to it. Direct verification is notoriously difficult due to the sheer scale of LLMs which often involves billions of variables and highly intricate computation graphs. Therefore, TrainVerify introduces a stage-wise parallel verification algorithm and shape-reduction techniques that significantly reduce complexity while preserving formal correctness. TrainVerify scales to frontier LLMs, including the successful verification of the Llama3 405B and DeepSeek-V3 671B training plans.
papers.abstract_zh:
大规模训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 需要在数千台设备上并行执行，从而产生巨大的计算成本。然而，这些成本高昂的分布式训练很容易出现正确性错误，导致无声错误并可能浪费数百万个 GPU 小时。这些错误很难通过测试暴露出来。

我们引入了 TrainVerify，这是一个用于可验证的 LLM 分布式训练的系统，以消除并行化错误。将深度学习模型的逻辑规范作为基本事实，TrainVerify 正式验证分布式并行执行计划在数学上与其等效。由于法学硕士规模庞大，通常涉及数十亿个变量和高度复杂的计算图，直接验证是出了名的困难。因此，TrainVerify 引入了分阶段并行验证算法和形状缩减技术，可显着降低复杂性，同时保持形式正确性。 TrainVerify 扩展到前沿法学硕士，包括 Llama3 405B 和 DeepSeek-V3 671B 培训计划的成功验证。

papers.title: TRIP: Coercion-resistant Registration for E-Voting with Verifiability and Usability in Votegral.
papers.abstract: Online voting is convenient and flexible, but amplifies the risks of voter coercion and vote buying. One promising mitigation strategy enables voters to give a coercer fake voting credentials, which silently cast votes that do not count. Current systems along these lines make problematic assumptions about credential issuance, however, such as strong trust in a registrar and/or in voter-controlled hardware, or expecting voters to interact with multiple registrars. Votegral is the first coercion-resistant voting architecture that leverages the physical security of in-person registration to address these credential-issuance challenges, amortizing the convenience costs of in-person registration by reusing credentials across successive elections. Votegral's registration component, TRIP, gives voters a kiosk in a privacy booth with which to print real and fake credentials on paper, eliminating dependence on trusted hardware in credential issuance. The voter learns and can verify in the privacy booth which credential is real, but real and fake credentials thereafter appear indistinguishable to others. Only voters actually under coercion, a hopefully-rare case, need to trust the kiosk. To achieve verifiability, each paper credential encodes an interactive zero-knowledge proof, which is sound in real credentials but unsound in fake credentials. Voters observe the difference in the order of printing steps, but need not understand the technical details. Experimental results with our prototype suggest that Votegral is practical and sufficiently scalable for real-world elections. User-visible latency of credential issuance in TRIP is at most 19.7 seconds even on resource-constrained kiosk hardware, making it suitable for registration at remote locations or on battery power. A companion usability study indicates that TRIP's usability is competitive with other e-voting systems including some lacking coercion resistance, and formal proofs support TRIP's combination of coercion-resistance and verifiability.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络投票方便灵活，但也放大了选民胁迫和买票的风险。一种有希望的缓解策略使选民能够向胁迫者提供虚假的投票凭证，从而默默地投出不计数的选票。然而，当前的系统对证书颁发做出了有问题的假设，例如对注册商和/或选民控制的硬件的强烈信任，或者期望选民与多个注册商进行交互。 Votegral 是第一个抗强制投票架构，它利用亲自注册的物理安全性来解决这些凭证颁发挑战，通过在连续选举中重复使用凭证来分摊亲自注册的便利成本。 Votegral 的注册组件 TRIP 在隐私亭为选民提供了一个信息亭，可以在纸上打印真实和虚假的凭证，从而消除了凭证颁发中对可信硬件的依赖。选民可以在隐私亭中了解并验证哪些凭证是真实的，但此后其他人就无法区分真假凭证。只有真正受到胁迫的选民（希望这种情况很少见）才需要信任这个信息亭。为了实现可验证性，每个纸质凭证都编码了一个交互式零知识证明，该证明在真实凭证中是可靠的，但在虚假凭证中是不可靠的。投票者观察打印步骤顺序的差异，但不需要了解技术细节。我们原型的实验结果表明，Votegral 对于现实世界的选举来说是实用的并且具有足够的可扩展性。即使在资源有限的自助服务终端硬件上，TRIP 中用户可见的凭证颁发延迟也最多为 19.7 秒，这使其适合在远程位置或使用电池进行注册。一项配套的可用性研究表明，TRIP 的可用性与其他电子投票系统（包括一些缺乏抗强制性的系统）相比具有竞争力，并且正式证据支持 TRIP 的抗强制性和可验证性的结合。

papers.title: Unlocking True Elasticity for the Cloud-Native Era with Dandelion.
papers.abstract:
Elasticity is fundamental to cloud computing. An elastic platform can quickly allocate resources to match the demand of each workload as it arrives, rather than pre-provisioning resources to meet performance objectives. However, even serverless platforms — which boot sandboxes in 10s to 100s of milliseconds — are not sufficiently elastic to avoid pre-provisioning expensive resources. Today's FaaS platforms provision many extra, idle sandboxes in memory to reduce the occurrence of slow, cold starts. Initializing securely isolated sandboxes with a POSIX-like computing environment that today's cloud users expect is slow as it requires booting a guest OS and configuring networking.

Our key insight is that the rise of cloud-native application development provides an opportunity to rethink the application interface to the cloud and co-design a much more efficient, elastic computing platform under the hood. We propose Dandelion, an elastic cloud platform with a declarative cloud-native programming model that replaces POSIX-based network interfaces with higher-level (e.g., HTTP-based) interfaces for applications to interact with remote services like cloud storage, databases, and AI inference services. Dandelion executes applications expressed as DAGs of pure compute functions and communication functions.

This enables Dandelion to securely execute compute functions in lightweight sandboxes that cold start in 100s of microseconds , since pure functions do not rely on software environments such as a guest OS. Dandelion makes it practical to boot sandboxes on-demand per request, decreasing performance variability by two to three orders of magnitude compared to Firecracker and reducing committed memory by 96% on average when running the Azure Functions trace.
papers.abstract_zh:
弹性是云计算的基础。弹性平台可以快速分配资源，以满足每个工作负载到达时的需求，而不是预先配置资源来满足性能目标。然而，即使是在数十到数百毫秒内启动沙箱的无服务器平台也没有足够的弹性来避免预先配置昂贵的资源。如今的 FaaS 平台在内存中提供了许多额外的空闲沙箱，以减少缓慢、冷启动的发生。使用当今云用户期望的类似 POSIX 的计算环境初始化安全隔离的沙箱速度很慢，因为它需要启动来宾操作系统并配置网络。

我们的主要见解是，云原生应用程序开发的兴起提供了一个重新思考云应用程序接口并共同设计一个更高效、更有弹性的计算平台的机会。我们提出了 Dandelion，这是一个具有声明性云原生编程模型的弹性云平台，用更高级别（例如基于 HTTP）的接口取代基于 POSIX 的网络接口，以便应用程序与云存储、数据库和 AI 推理服务等远程服务进行交互。 Dandelion 执行以纯计算功能和通信功能的 DAG 表示的应用程序。

这使得 Dandelion 能够在数十微秒内冷启动的轻量级沙箱中安全地执行计算函数，因为纯函数不依赖于客户操作系统等软件环境。 Dandelion 可以根据请求按需启动沙箱，与 Firecracker 相比，性能波动性降低了两到三个数量级，并且在运行 Azure Functions 跟踪时平均减少了 96% 的提交内存。

papers.title: WASIT: Deep and Continuous Differential Testing of WebAssembly System Interface Implementations.
papers.abstract: This paper presents WASIT, a powerful specification-driven differential testing framework for WebAssembly (Wasm) system interface (WASI) implementations. WASIT invents several innovative techniques to address the challenges facing state-of-the-art testing approaches when applied to WASI implementations. Specifically, it introduces real-time resource abstraction and tracking to facilitate the generation of meaningful and dependent WASI function calls. It also creates a domain-specific language to automatically filter out uninteresting WASI function argument values by augmenting the WASI specification. Finally, it adopts a decoupled system architecture to achieve smooth co-evolution with WASI. Our evaluation shows that WASIT successfully found 48 new WASI-specific bugs in six popular Wasm runtimes, with 41 confirmed, 37 fixed, and three CVEs assigned.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 WASIT，这是一个强大的规范驱动的差异测试框架，用于 WebAssembly (Wasm) 系统接口 (WASI) 实现。 WASIT 发明了多种创新技术来解决最先进的测试方法在应用于 WASI 实施时所面临的挑战。具体来说，它引入了实时资源抽象和跟踪，以方便生成有意义且相关的 WASI 函数调用。它还创建了一种特定于领域的语言，通过增强 WASI 规范来自动过滤掉不感兴趣的 WASI 函数参数值。最后，采用解耦的系统架构，实现与WASI的平滑协同进化。我们的评估显示，WASIT 在 6 个流行的 Wasm 运行时中成功发现了 48 个新的 WASI 特定错误，其中 41 个已确认，37 个已修复，并分配了 3 个 CVE。

papers.title: μFork: Supporting POSIX fork Within a Single-Address-Space OS.
papers.abstract:
Single-address-space operating systems have well-known lightweightness benefits that result from their central design idea: the kernel and applications share a unique address space. This model makes these operating systems (OSes) incompatible by design with a large class of software: multiprocess POSIX applications. Indeed, the semantics of the primitive used to create POSIX processes, fork, are inextricably tied to the existence of multiple address spaces.

Prior approaches addressing this issue trade off lightweightness, compatibility and/or isolation. We propose μFork , a single-address-space operating system design supporting POSIX fork on modern hardware without compromising on any of these key objectives. μFork emulates POSIX processes (μprocesses) and achieves fork by creating for the child a copy of the parent μprocess' memory at a different location within a single address space. This approach presents two challenges: relocating the child's absolute memory references (pointers), as well as providing user/kernel and μprocesses isolation without impacting lightweightness. We address them using CHERI. We implement μFork and evaluate it upon three real-world use-cases: Redis snapshots, Nginx multi-worker deployments, and Zygote FaaS worker warm-up. μFork outperforms previous work and traditional monolithic OSes on key lightweightness metrics by an order of magnitude, e.g. it can offer a fork-bound FaaS function throughput 24% higher than that of a monolithic OS, and can fork a μprocess in 54 μs, 3.7× faster than a traditional fork.
papers.abstract_zh:
单地址空间操作系统具有众所周知的轻量级优势，这源于其核心设计思想：内核和应用程序共享唯一的地址空间。此模型使这些操作系统 (OS) 在设计上与一大类软件不兼容：多进程 POSIX 应用程序。事实上，用于创建 POSIX 进程的原语（fork）的语义与多个地址空间的存在密不可分。

解决这个问题的现有方法需要权衡轻量性、兼容性和/或隔离性。我们提出 μFork，这是一种单地址空间操作系统设计，支持现代硬件上的 POSIX 分叉，而不会影响任何这些关键目标。 μFork 模拟 POSIX 进程 (μprocesses)，并通过在单个地址空间内的不同位置为子进程创建父 μprocess 内存的副本来实现分叉。这种方法提出了两个挑战：重新定位子进程的绝对内存引用（指针），以及在不影响轻量性的情况下提供用户/内核和微进程隔离。我们使用 CHERI 来解决这些问题。我们实现 μFork 并根据三个实际用例对其进行评估：Redis 快照、Nginx 多工作部署和 Zygote FaaS 工作预热。 μFork 在关键轻量级指标上的表现优于之前的工作和传统的单片操作系统一个数量级，例如它可以提供比单片操作系统高 24% 的分叉绑定 FaaS 函数吞吐量，并且可以在 54 μs 内分叉一个 μprocess，比传统分叉快 3.7 倍。

papers.title: Aceso: Achieving Efficient Fault Tolerance in Memory-Disaggregated Key-Value Stores.
papers.abstract: Disaggregated memory (DM) has garnered increasing attention due to high resource utilization. Fault tolerance is critical for key-value (KV) stores on DM since machine failures are common in datacenters. Existing KV stores on DM are generally based on replication to achieve fault tolerance, which however suffer from high memory space and performance overheads. In this paper, we investigate the efficiency of different fault-tolerant mechanisms on DM and reveal that checkpointing and erasure coding work best for the index and KV pairs respectively. Based on these observations, we present Aceso, a DM-based KV store that employs a hybrid fault-tolerant mechanism, combining checkpointing for the index and erasure coding for KV pairs. However, applying this hybrid mechanism to DM introduces multiple challenges, i.e. , performance interference and data loss of checkpointing, slow space reclamation and failure recovery of erasure coding. To address these challenges, Aceso leverages a differential checkpointing scheme to reduce performance interference incurred by the bandwidth consumption to transmit checkpoints, a versioning approach to recover lost index updates on failures, a delta-based space reclamation mechanism to reclaim obsolete KV pairs with negligible overhead, and a tiered recovery scheme to minimize user disruption. Our experiments show that Aceso simultaneously achieves up to 2.7× throughput improvement, up to 54% tail latency reduction, and 44% memory space savings compared with the state-of-the-art replication-based KV store on DM.
papers.abstract_zh: 分解内存（DM）由于资源利用率高而受到越来越多的关注。由于机器故障在数据中心中很常见，因此容错对于 DM 上的键值 (KV) 存储至关重要。 DM上现有的KV存储通常基于复制来实现容错，但内存空间和性能开销较高。在本文中，我们研究了 DM 上不同容错机制的效率，并揭示了检查点和纠删码分别最适合索引和 KV 对。基于这些观察，我们提出了 Aceso，一种基于 DM 的 KV 存储，它采用混合容错机制，结合了索引检查点和 KV 对的纠删码。然而，将这种混合机制应用于DM会带来多重挑战，即检查点的性能干扰和数据丢失、缓慢的空间回收和纠删码的故障恢复。为了应对这些挑战，Aceso 利用差异检查点方案来减少传输检查点的带宽消耗所带来的性能干扰，利用版本控制方法来恢复故障时丢失的索引更新，利用基于增量的空间回收机制来回收过时的 KV 对，而开销可以忽略不计，并利用分层恢复方案来最大限度地减少用户中断。我们的实验表明，与 DM 上最先进的基于复制的 KV 存储相比，Aceso 同时实现了高达 2.7 倍的吞吐量提升、高达 54% 的尾部延迟减少以及 44% 的内存空间节省。

papers.title: Apparate: Rethinking Early Exits to Tame Latency-Throughput Tensions in ML Serving.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) inference platforms are tasked with balancing two competing goals: ensuring high throughput given many requests, and delivering low-latency responses to support interactive applications. Unfortunately, existing platform knobs (e.g., batch sizes) fail to ease this fundamental tension, and instead only enable users to harshly trade off one property for the other. This paper explores an alternate strategy to taming throughput-latency tradeoffs by changing the granularity at which inference is performed. We present Apparate, a system that automatically applies and manages early exits (EEs) in ML models, whereby certain inputs can exit with results at intermediate layers. To cope with the time-varying overhead and accuracy challenges that EEs bring, Apparate repurposes exits to provide continual feedback that powers several novel runtime monitoring and adaptation strategies. Apparate lowers median response latencies by 40.5--91.5% and 10.0--24.2% for diverse CV and NLP classification workloads, and median time-per-token latencies by 22.6--77.9% for generative scenarios, without affecting throughputs or violating tight accuracy constraints.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 推理平台的任务是平衡两个相互竞争的目标：确保给定许多请求的高吞吐量，并提供低延迟响应以支持交互式应用程序。不幸的是，现有的平台旋钮（例如批量大小）无法缓解这种根本性的紧张关系，而只能让用户艰难地用一种属性换取另一种属性。本文探讨了一种通过改变执行推理的粒度来控制吞吐量与延迟之间权衡的替代策略。我们提出了 Apparate，这是一个自动应用和管理 ML 模型中的早期退出 (EE) 的系统，从而某些输入可以在中间层退出并产生结果。为了应对 EE 带来的随时间变化的开销和准确性挑战，Apparate 重新调整了出口的用途，以提供持续的反馈，为多种新颖的运行时监控和适应策略提供支持。 Apparate 将各种 CV 和 NLP 分类工作负载的中值响应延迟降低了 40.5--91.5% 和 10.0--24.2%，将生成场景的每个令牌时间中值延迟降低了 22.6--77.9%，而不影响吞吐量或违反严格的精度约束。

papers.title: Autobahn: Seamless high speed BFT.
papers.abstract: Today's practical, high performance Byzantine Fault Tolerant (BFT) consensus protocols operate in the partial synchrony model. However, existing protocols are inefficient when deployments are indeed partially synchronous. They deliver either low latency during fault-free, synchronous periods ( good intervals ) or robust recovery from events that interrupt progress ( blips ). At one end, traditional, view-based BFT protocols optimize for latency during good intervals, but, when blips occur, can suffer from performance degradation ( hangovers ) that can last beyond the return of a good interval. At the other end, modern DAG-based BFT protocols recover more gracefully from blips, but exhibit lackluster latency during good intervals. To close the gap, this work presents Autobahn, a novel high-throughput BFT protocol that offers both low latency and seamless recovery from blips. By combining a highly parallel asynchronous data dissemination layer with a low-latency, partially synchronous consensus mechanism, Autobahn ( i ) avoids the hangovers incurred by traditional BFT protocols and ( ii ) matches the throughput of state of the art DAG-based BFT protocols while cutting their latency in half, matching the latency of traditional BFT protocols.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今实用的高性能拜占庭容错（BFT）共识协议在部分同步模型中运行。然而，当部署确实部分同步时，现有协议效率低下。它们要么在无故障的同步周期（良好的间隔）期间提供低延迟，要么从中断进度的事件（blips）中提供稳健的恢复。一方面，传统的基于视图的 BFT 协议会针对良好间隔期间的延迟进行优化，但是，当出现突发事件时，可能会遭受性能下降（宿醉），这种下降可能会持续到良好间隔返回之后。另一方面，现代基于 DAG 的 BFT 协议可以更优雅地从 blip 中恢复，但在良好的时间间隔内表现出乏善可陈的延迟。为了缩小差距，这项工作提出了 Autobahn，这是一种新颖的高吞吐量 BFT 协议，可提供低延迟和从 blip 中的无缝恢复。通过将高度并行的异步数据传播层与低延迟、部分同步的共识机制相结合，Autobahn (i) 避免了传统 BFT 协议带来的后遗症，并且 (ii) 与最先进的基于 DAG 的 BFT 协议的吞吐量相匹配，同时将其延迟减少了一半，与传统 BFT 协议的延迟相匹配。

papers.title: BIZA: Design of Self-Governing Block-Interface ZNS AFA for Endurance and Performance.
papers.abstract:
All-flash array (AFA) has become one of the most popular storage forms in diverse computing domains. While traditional AFA implementations adopt the block interface to seamlessly integrate with most existing software, this interface hinders the host from managing SSD internal tasks explicitly, which results in both short endurance and poor performance. In comparison, ZNS AFA, such as RAIZN, adopts ZNS SSDs and exposes the ZNS interface to the users. This solution attempts to raise the level of responsibility for SSD management. Unfortunately, it faces severe compatibility issues as most upper-layer software only takes block I/O accesses for granted.

In this work, we propose BIZA , a self-governing blockinterface ZNS AFA to proactively schedule I/O requests and SSD internal tasks via the ZNS interface while exposing the user-friendly block interface to upper-layer software. BIZA achieves both long endurance and high performance by exploiting the zone random write area (ZRWA) and internal parallelisms of ZNS SSDs. Specifically, to mitigate write amplification, BIZA proposes a ghost-cache-based algorithm to identify hot data and absorb their updates in the scarce ZRWA. BIZA also employs a novel guess-and-verify mechanism to detect the mappings between zones and I/O resources at a low cost. Thereafter, BIZA can serve write requests and internal tasks in parallel with our customized I/O scheduler for high throughput and low latency. The evaluation results show that BIZA can reduce write amplification by 42.7% while achieving 93.2% higher throughput and 62.8% lower tail latency, compared to the state-of-the-art AFA solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
全闪存阵列（AFA）已成为各种计算领域中最流行的存储形式之一。虽然传统的 AFA 实现采用块接口与大多数现有软件无缝集成，但该接口阻碍主机显式管理 SSD 内部任务，从而导致耐用性短且性能差。相比之下，ZNS AFA，例如RAIZN，采用ZNS SSD并将ZNS接口暴露给用户。该解决方案试图提高SSD管理的责任级别。不幸的是，它面临着严重的兼容性问题，因为大多数上层软件只将块 I/O 访问视为理所当然。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 BIZA，一种自治块接口 ZNS AFA，通过 ZNS 接口主动调度 I/O 请求和 SSD 内部任务，同时向上层软件公开用户友好的块接口。 BIZA 通过利用区域随机写入区域 (ZRWA) 和 ZNS SSD 的内部并行性，实现了长耐用性和高性能。具体来说，为了减轻写放大，BIZA 提出了一种基于幽灵缓存的算法来识别热数据并在稀缺的 ZRWA 中吸收其更新。 BIZA还采用新颖的猜测和验证机制来以低成本检测区域和I/O资源之间的映射。此后，BIZA 可以与我们定制的 I/O 调度程序并行处理写入请求和内部任务，以实现高吞吐量和低延迟。评估结果表明，与最先进的 AFA 解决方案相比，BIZA 可以减少 42.7% 的写入放大，同时吞吐量提高 93.2%，尾部延迟降低 62.8%。

papers.title: Caribou: Fine-Grained Geospatial Shifting of Serverless Applications for Sustainability.
papers.abstract: Sustainability in computing is critical as environmental concerns rise. The cloud industry's carbon footprint is significant and rapidly growing. We show that dynamic geospatial shifting of cloud workloads to regions with lower carbon emission energy sources, particularly for more portable cloud workloads such as serverless applications, has a high potential to lower operational carbon emissions. To make the case, we build a comprehensive framework called Caribou that offloads serverless workflows across geo-distributed regions. Caribou requires no change in the application logic, nor on the provider side. It dynamically determines the best deployment plans, automatically (re-) deploys functions to appropriate regions, and redirects traffic to new endpoints. In reducing operational carbon through fine-grained, function-level offloading, Caribou does not undermine standard metrics such as performance and cost. We show how this approach can reduce the carbon footprint by an average of 22.9% to 66.6% across the North American continent. We demonstrate how a detailed specification of location constraints (e.g., to ensure compliance of one stage) can allow emission reductions for workflows (e.g., by offloading other stages). By showcasing the feasibility of carbon-aware geospatial application deployment, Caribou aims to push the boundaries of system techniques available to curtail cloud carbon emissions and provide a framework for future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着环境问题的日益严重，计算的可持续性变得至关重要。云行业的碳足迹巨大且快速增长。我们表明，云工作负载动态地理空间转移到碳排放能源较低的地区，特别是对于无服务器应用程序等更便携的云工作负载，具有降低运营碳排放的巨大潜力。为了证明这一点，我们构建了一个名为 Caribou 的综合框架，该框架可以跨地理分布式区域卸载无服务器工作流程。 Caribou 不需要更改应用程序逻辑，也不需要更改提供商端。它动态确定最佳部署计划，自动（重新）将功能部署到适当的区域，并将流量重定向到新端点。通过细粒度、功能级卸载来减少运营碳排放，Caribou 不会破坏性能和成本等标准指标。我们展示了这种方法如何能够将整个北美大陆的碳足迹平均减少 22.9% 至 66.6%。我们演示了位置约束的详细规范（例如，确保一个阶段的合规性）如何能够减少工作流程的排放（例如，通过卸载其他阶段）。通过展示碳感知地理空间应用部署的可行性，Caribou 旨在突破可用于减少云碳排放的系统技术的界限，并为未来的研究提供框架。

papers.title: CHIME: A Cache-Efficient and High-Performance Hybrid Index on Disaggregated Memory.
papers.abstract: Disaggregated memory (DM) is a widely discussed datacenter architecture in academia and industry. It decouples computing and memory resources from monolithic servers into two network-connected resource pools. Range indexes are widely adopted by storage systems on DM to efficiently locate and query remote data. However, existing range indexes on DM suffer from either high computing-side cache consumption or high memory-side read amplifications. In this paper, we propose CHIME, a hybrid index combining B+ trees with hopscotch hashing, to achieve low cache consumption and low read amplifications simultaneously. There are three challenges in constructing CHIME on DM, i.e. , the complicated optimistic synchronization, the extra metadata access, and the read amplifications introduced by hopscotch hashing. CHIME leverages 1) a three-level optimistic synchronization scheme to synchronize read and write operations with various granularities, 2) an access-aggregated metadata management technique to eliminate extra metadata accesses by piggybacking and replicating metadata, and 3) an effective hotness-aware speculative read mechanism to mitigate the read amplifications of hopscotch hashing. Experimental results show that CHIME outperforms the state-of-the-art range indexes on DM by up to 5.1× with the same cache size and achieves similar performance with up to 8.7× lower cache consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 分解内存（DM）是学术界和工业界广泛讨论的数据中心架构。它将计算和内存资源从单一服务器解耦到两个网络连接的资源池中。 DM上的存储系统广泛采用范围索引来高效地定位和查询远程数据。然而，DM 上现有的范围索引要么存在计算端高速缓存消耗较高的问题，要么存在内存端读取放大较高的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 CHIME，一种将 B+ 树与跳房子哈希相结合的混合索引，以同时实现低缓存消耗和低读放大。在 DM 上构建 CHIME 面临三个挑战，即复杂的乐观同步、额外的元数据访问以及跳房子哈希引入的读放大。 CHIME 利用 1) 三级乐观同步方案来同步各种粒度的读写操作，2) 访问聚合元数据管理技术，通过搭载和复制元数据来消除额外的元数据访问，3) 有效的热感知推测读取机制，以减轻跳房子哈希的读取放大。实验结果表明，在相同缓存大小的情况下，CHIME 的性能比 DM 上最先进的范围索引高出 5.1 倍，并在缓存消耗降低 8.7 倍的情况下实现相似的性能。

papers.title: Cookie Monster: Efficient On-Device Budgeting for Differentially-Private Ad-Measurement Systems.
papers.abstract: With the impending removal of third-party cookies from major browsers and the introduction of new privacy-preserving advertising APIs, the research community has a timely opportunity to assist industry in qualitatively improving the Web's privacy. This paper discusses our efforts, within a W3C community group, to enhance existing privacy-preserving advertising measurement APIs. We analyze designs from Google, Apple, Meta and Mozilla, and augment them with a more rigorous and efficient differential privacy (DP) budgeting component. Our approach, called Cookie Monster , enforces well-defined DP guarantees and enables advertisers to conduct more private measurement queries accurately. By framing the privacy guarantee in terms of an individual form of DP, we can make DP budgeting more efficient than in current systems that use a traditional DP definition. We incorporate Cookie Monster into Chrome and evaluate it on microbenchmarks and advertising datasets. Across workloads, Cookie Monster significantly outperforms baselines in enabling more advertising measurements under comparable DP protection.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着主要浏览器中第三方 cookie 的删除以及新的隐私保护广告 API 的引入，研究界有一个及时的机会来协助行业从质量上改善网络隐私。本文讨论了我们在 W3C 社区小组内为增强现有的隐私保护广告测量 API 所做的努力。我们分析了 Google、Apple、Meta 和 Mozilla 的设计，并用更严格、更高效的差分隐私 (DP) 预算组件对其进行了增强。我们的方法称为 Cookie Monster，强制执行明确定义的 DP 保证，并使广告商能够准确地进行更私密的测量查询。通过以个体形式的 DP 来构建隐私保证，我们可以使 DP 预算比使用传统 DP 定义的当前系统更加高效。我们将 Cookie Monster 合并到 Chrome 中，并在微基准和广告数据集上对其进行评估。在所有工作负载中，Cookie Monster 在可比 DP 保护下实现更多广告测量方面显着优于基准。

papers.title: Dirigent: Lightweight Serverless Orchestration.
papers.abstract: While Function as a Service (FaaS) platforms can initialize function sandboxes on worker nodes in 10-100s of milliseconds, the latency to schedule functions in real FaaS clusters can be orders of magnitude higher. The current approach of building FaaS cluster managers on top of legacy orchestration systems (e.g., Kubernetes) leads to high scheduling delays when clusters experience high sandbox churn, which is common for FaaS. Generic cluster managers use many hierarchical abstractions and internal components to manage and reconcile cluster state with frequent persistent updates. This becomes a bottleneck for FaaS since the cluster state frequently changes as sandboxes are created on the critical path of requests. Based on our root cause analysis of performance issues in existing FaaS cluster managers, we propose Dirigent , a clean-slate system architecture for FaaS orchestration with three key principles. First, Dirigent optimizes internal cluster manager abstractions to simplify state management. Second, it eliminates persistent state updates on the critical path of function invocations, leveraging the fact that FaaS abstracts sandbox locations from users to relax exact state reconstruction guarantees. Finally, Dirigent runs monolithic control and data planes to minimize internal communication overheads and maximize throughput. We compare Dirigent to state-of-the-art FaaS platforms and show that Dirigent reduces 99 th percentile per-function scheduling latency for a production workload by 2.79× compared to AWS Lambda. Dirigent can spin up 2500 sandboxes per second at low latency, which is 1250× more than Knative.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然功能即服务 (FaaS) 平台可以在 10-100 毫秒内初始化工作节点上的功能沙箱，但在实际 FaaS 集群中调度功能的延迟可能要高出几个数量级。当前在传统编排系统（例如 Kubernetes）之上构建 FaaS 集群管理器的方法，当集群经历高沙箱流失时，会导致较高的调度延迟，这对于 FaaS 来说很常见。通用集群管理器使用许多分层抽象和内部组件来管理和协调集群状态与频繁的持久更新。这成为 FaaS 的瓶颈，因为随着在请求的关键路径上创建沙箱，集群状态经常发生变化。基于对现有 FaaS 集群管理器性能问题的根本原因分析，我们提出了 Dirigent，这是一种用于 FaaS 编排的全新系统架构，具有三个关键原则。首先，Dirigent 优化内部集群管理器抽象以简化状态管理。其次，它消除了函数调用关键路径上的持久状态更新，利用 FaaS 从用户那里抽象出沙箱位置的事实来放松精确的状态重建保证。最后，Dirigent 运行整体控制和数据平面，以最大限度地减少内部通信开销并最大限度地提高吞吐量。我们将 Dirigent 与最先进的 FaaS 平台进行比较，结果表明，与 AWS Lambda 相比，Dirigent 将生产工作负载的第 99 个百分位数的每个函数调度延迟降低了 2.79 倍。 Dirigent 每秒可以以低延迟旋转 2500 个沙箱，比 Knative 高出 1250 倍。

papers.title: DNS Congestion Control in Adversarial Settings.
papers.abstract: We instigate the study of adversarial congestion in the context of the Domain Name System (DNS). By strategically choking inter-server channels, this new type of DoS attack can disrupt a large user group's access to target DNS servers at a low cost. In reminiscence of classic network congestion control, we propose a DNS congestion control (DCC) framework as a fundamental yet practical mitigation measure for such attacks. With an optimized fair-queuing message scheduler, DCC ensures benign clients fair access to inter-server channels regardless of an attacker's behavior; with a set of extensible anomaly detection and signaling mechanisms, it minimizes collateral damage to innocuous clients. We architect DCC in a non-invasive style so that it can readily augment existing DNS servers. Our prototype evaluation demonstrates that DCC effectively mitigates adversarial congestion while incurring minor performance overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们发起了域名系统（DNS）背景下的对抗性拥塞研究。通过战略性地阻塞服务器间通道，这种新型 DoS 攻击可以以较低的成本破坏大量用户组对目标 DNS 服务器的访问。回顾经典的网络拥塞控制，我们提出了 DNS 拥塞控制（DCC）框架作为此类攻击的基本但实用的缓解措施。通过优化的公平队列消息调度程序，DCC 可确保良性客户端公平访问服务器间通道，而不管攻击者的行为如何；通过一套可扩展的异常检测和信号机制，它可以最大限度地减少对无害客户端的附带损害。我们以非侵入式方式构建 DCC，以便它可以轻松增强现有的 DNS 服务器。我们的原型评估表明，DCC 有效地缓解了对抗性拥塞，同时产生了较小的性能开销。

papers.title: Efficient Reproduction of Fault-Induced Failures in Distributed Systems with Feedback-Driven Fault Injection.
papers.abstract:
Debugging a failure usually requires reproducing it first. This can be hard for failures in production distributed systems, where bugs are exposed only by some unusual faulty events. While fault injection testing becomes popular, existing solutions are designed for bug finding. They are ineffective and inefficient to reproduce a specific failure during debugging.

We explore a new type of fault injection technique for quickly reproducing a given fault-induced production failure in distributed systems. We present a tool, Anduril, that uses static causal analysis and a novel feedback-driven algorithm to quickly search the enormous fault space for the root-cause fault and timing. We evaluate Anduril on 22 real-world complex fault-induced failures from five large-scale distributed systems. Anduril reproduced all failures by identifying and injecting the root-cause faults at the right time, in a median of 8 minutes.
papers.abstract_zh:
调试故障通常需要首先重现它。这对于生产分布式系统中的故障来说可能很困难，因为只有一些不寻常的故障事件才会暴露错误。虽然故障注入测试变得流行，但现有的解决方案是为错误查找而设计的。它们在调试过程中重现特定故障的效率低下。

我们探索一种新型的故障注入技术，用于快速重现分布式系统中给定的故障引起的生产故障。我们提出了一种工具 Anduril，它使用静态因果分析和新颖的反馈驱动算法来快速搜索巨大的故障空间以查找根本原因故障和时序。我们对来自 5 个大型分布式系统的 22 个现实世界复杂故障引起的故障评估了 Anduril。 Anduril 通过在正确的时间（平均 8 分钟）识别并注入根本原因故障，重现了所有故障。

papers.title: Enabling Parallelism Hot Switching for Efficient Training of Large Language Models.
papers.abstract:
Training of large-scale deep learning models necessitates parallelizing the model and data across numerous devices, and the choice of parallelism strategy substantially depends on the training workloads such as memory consumption, computation cost, and communication cost. Current approaches generally assume uniform training workloads across samples in a given task. Thus, existing systems are designed to adopt a static parallelism strategy throughout one training process. Nevertheless, when training models with sequence inputs, this assumption fails due to the sequence length variation across samples. Consequently, training with a static parallelism strategy would result in sub-optimal performance.

In this paper, we first reveal the under-explored fact that the optimal parallelism strategy varies even for the sequences within a single mini-batch. Motivated by this, we present HotSPa, a novel system that adopts multiple parallelism strategies for efficient training with sequence inputs. To be specific, given a mini-batch of training sequences, HotSPa partitions them into multiple groups and applies different parallelism strategies to process each group individually. To enable the hot switching between strategies, HotSPa transfers model parameters and accumulated gradients among the devices on the fly. Significant solutions are proposed with the hope of seamless and rapid parallelism hot switching. Firstly, we design a graph compiler, which generates distributed computation graphs for different parallelism strategies simultaneously, and orchestrates them to share a single model storage backbone. Secondly, we develop a simple yet effective hot switch planner, which heuristically deduces communication plans to accelerate the transition of model partitioning given any pairs of strategies. Extensive experiments on large language model training demonstrate that HotSPa can be up to 2.99× faster than Megatron-LM and DeepSpeed that utilize static parallelism strategies. Source code is available: https://github.com/PKU-DAIR/Hetu.
papers.abstract_zh:
大规模深度学习模型的训练需要在众多设备上并行化模型和数据，而并行策略的选择很大程度上取决于训练工作负载，例如内存消耗、计算成本和通信成本。当前的方法通常假设给定任务中的样本具有统一的训练工作量。因此，现有系统被设计为在整个训练过程中采用静态并行策略。然而，当使用序列输入训练模型时，由于样本之间的序列长度变化，这种假设失败。因此，使用静态并行策略进行训练将导致性能次优。

在本文中，我们首先揭示了一个尚未充分探索的事实，即即使对于单个小批量内的序列，最佳并行策略也会有所不同。受此启发，我们提出了 HotSPa，这是一种新颖的系统，它采用多种并行策略，通过序列输入进行高效训练。具体来说，给定一个小批量的训练序列，HotSPa 将它们分为多个组，并应用不同的并行策略来单独处理每个组。为了实现策略之间的热切换，HotSPa 在设备之间动态传输模型参数和累积梯度。提出了重要的解决方案，希望能够实现无缝且快速的并行热切换。首先，我们设计了一个图编译器，它同时为不同的并行策略生成分布式计算图，并编排它们以共享单个模型存储主干。其次，我们开发了一个简单而有效的热切换规划器，它可以启发式地推导出通信计划，以加速给定任何策略对的模型分区的转换。对大型语言模型训练的大量实验表明，HotSPa 的速度比采用静态并行策略的 Megatron-LM 和 DeepSpeed 快 2.99 倍。源代码可见：https://github.com/PKU-DAIR/Hetu。

papers.title: Fast & Safe IO Memory Protection.
papers.abstract:
IO Memory protection mechanisms prevent malicious and/or buggy IO devices from executing errant transfers into memory. Modern servers achieve this using an IOMMU---IO devices operate on virtual addresses, and IOMMU translates virtual addresses to physical addresses (potentially speeding up translations using a cache called IOTLB) before executing memory transfers. Despite their importance, design of memory protection mechanisms that can provide strong safety properties while achieving high performance has remained elusive. Indeed, recent studies from production datacenters demonstrate that inefficiencies within state-of-the-art memory protection mechanisms result in significant throughput degradation, orders-of-magnitude tail latency inflation, and violation of isolation guarantees.

We present Fast & Safe (F&S), a simple modification to existing memory protection mechanisms that enables them to provide the strongest safety property, and yet, near-completely eliminates their overheads. The key insight in F&S design is that, rather than solely focusing on minimizing IOTLB miss rates, we should focus on reducing the cost of each IOTLB miss. We demonstrate that this change of perspective enables a simple F&S design that requires no modifications in host hardware and minimal modifications within the operating system.
papers.abstract_zh:
IO 内存保护机制可防止恶意和/或有错误的 IO 设备向内存执行错误传输。现代服务器使用 IOMMU 来实现这一点——IO 设备在虚拟地址上运行，IOMMU 在执行内存传输之前将虚拟地址转换为物理地址（可能使用称为 IOTLB 的缓存来加速转换）。尽管它们很重要，但能够在实现高性能的同时提供强大的安全特性的内存保护机制的设计仍然难以实现。事实上，最近来自生产数据中心的研究表明，最先进的内存保护机制中的低效率会导致吞吐量显着下降、数量级的尾部延迟膨胀以及违反隔离保证。

我们提出了快速和安全（F＆S），这是对现有内存保护机制的简单修改，使它们能够提供最强的安全属性，但几乎完全消除了它们的开销。 F&S 设计的关键见解是，我们不应该仅仅专注于最小化 IOTLB 缺失率，而应该专注于降低每个 IOTLB 缺失的成本。我们证明，这种观点的改变可以实现简单的 F&S 设计，无需修改主机硬件，并且对操作系统进行最少的修改。

papers.title: Fast Core Scheduling with Userspace Process Abstraction.
papers.abstract: We introduce uProcess, a pure userspace process abstraction that enables CPU cores to be rescheduled among applications at sub-microsecond timescale without trapping into the kernel. We achieve this by constructing a special privileged mode in userspace to achieve safe and efficient separation among uProcesses. The core idea is a careful combination of two emerging hardware features - userspace interrupts (Uintr) and memory protection keys (MPK). We materialize the uProcess abstraction by implementing Vessel, a userspace core scheduler that colocates latency-critical and best-effort applications with minimal switching overhead when they time-share CPU cores. Our experiment result shows that Vessel exhibits better overall performance and low latency when multiple applications are colocated.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了 uProcess，一种纯粹的用户空间进程抽象，它使 CPU 核心能够以亚微秒的时间尺度在应用程序之间重新调度，而不会陷入内核。我们通过在用户空间构建特殊的特权模式来实现 uProcess 之间安全高效的分离来实现这一点。其核心思想是两个新兴硬件功能的精心组合——用户空间中断（Uintr）和内存保护密钥（MPK）。我们通过实现 Vessel 来具体化 uProcess 抽象，Vessel 是一个用户空间核心调度程序，可在分时共享 CPU 核心时以最小的切换开销来并置延迟关键且尽力而为的应用程序。我们的实验结果表明，当多个应用程序共置时，Vessel 表现出更好的整体性能和低延迟。

papers.title: Fast, Flexible, and Practical Kernel Extensions.
papers.abstract:
The ability to safely extend OS kernel functionality is a longstanding goal in OS design, with the widespread use of the eBPF framework in Linux and Windows demonstrating the benefits of such extensibility. However, existing solutions for kernel extensibility (including eBPF) are limited and constrain users either in the extent of functionality that they can offload to the kernel or the performance overheads incurred by their extensions.

We present KFlex: a new approach to kernel extensibility that strikes an improved balance between the expressivity and performance of kernel extensions. To do so, KFlex separates the safety of kernel-owned resources ( e.g. , kernel memory) from the safety of extension-specific resources ( e.g. , extension memory). This separation enables KFlex to use distinct, bespoke mechanisms to enforce each safety property---automated verification and lightweight runtime checks, respectively---which enables the offload of diverse functionality while incurring low runtime overheads.

We realize KFlex in the context of Linux. We demonstrate that KFlex enables users to offload functionality that cannot be offloaded today and provides significant end-to-end performance benefits for applications. Several of KFlex's proposed mechanisms have been upstreamed into the Linux kernel mainline, with efforts ongoing for full integration.
papers.abstract_zh:
安全扩展操作系统内核功能的能力是操作系统设计的长期目标，eBPF 框架在 Linux 和 Windows 中的广泛使用证明了这种可扩展性的好处。然而，现有的内核可扩展性解决方案（包括 eBPF）是有限的，并且限制了用户可以卸载到内核的功能范围或扩展所产生的性能开销。

我们提出了 KFlex：一种实现内核可扩展性的新方法，它在内核扩展的表现力和性能之间取得了更好的平衡。为此，KFlex 将内核拥有的资源（例如，内核内存）的安全性与扩展特定资源（例如，扩展内存）的安全性分开。这种分离使 KFlex 能够使用不同的定制机制来强制执行每个安全属性（分别是自动验证和轻量级运行时检查），从而能够卸载不同的功能，同时产生较低的运行时开销。

我们在 Linux 环境中实现 KFlex。我们证明，KFlex 使用户能够卸载目前无法卸载的功能，并为应用程序提供显着的端到端性能优势。 KFlex 提出的一些机制已上游到 Linux 内核主线，并且正在努力实现全面集成。

papers.title: FBDetect: Catching Tiny Performance Regressions at Hyperscale through In-Production Monitoring.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Meta's FBDetect system, which advances the state of the art in performance regression detection by catching regressions as small as 0.005% in noisy production environments. FBDetect monitors around 800,000 time series covering various types of metrics (e.g., throughput, latency, CPU and memory usage) to detect regressions caused by code or configuration changes in hundreds of services running on millions of servers. FBDetect introduces advanced techniques to capture stack traces fleet-wide, measure fine-grained subroutine-level performance differences, filter out deceptive false-positive regressions, deduplicate correlated regressions, and analyze root causes. Beyond these individual techniques, a key strength of FBDetect over prior work is its battle-tested robustness, proven by seven years of production use, and each year catching regressions that would have wasted millions of servers if left undetected.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Meta 的 FBDetect 系统，该系统通过在嘈杂的生产环境中捕获小至 0.005% 的回归，推进了性能回归检测的最新技术。 FBDetect 监控大约 800,000 个时间序列，涵盖各种类型的指标（例如吞吐量、延迟、CPU 和内存使用情况），以检测数百万台服务器上运行的数百个服务的代码或配置更改引起的回归。 FBDetect 引入了先进的技术来捕获整个队列的堆栈跟踪、测量细粒度的子例程级性能差异、过滤掉欺骗性的误报回归、删除重复的相关回归以及分析根本原因。除了这些单独的技术之外，FBDetect 相对于之前的工作的一个关键优势是其经过实战考验的稳健性，这已通过七年的生产使用证明，并且每年都会捕获回归，如果不及时发现，这些回归将浪费数百万台服务器。

papers.title: Icarus: Trustworthy Just-In-Time Compilers with Symbolic Meta-Execution.
papers.abstract: Just-in-time (JIT) compilers make JavaScript run efficiently by replacing slow JavaScript interpreter code with fast machine code. However, this efficiency comes at a cost: bugs in JIT compilers can completely subvert all language-based (memory) safety guarantees, and thereby introduce catastrophic exploitable vulnerabilities. We present Icarus: a new framework for implementing JIT compilers that are automatically, formally verified to be safe, and which can then be converted to C++ that can be linked into browser runtimes. Crucially, we show how to build a JIT with Icarus such that verifying the JIT implementation statically ensures the security of all possible programs that the JIT could ever generate at run-time, via a novel technique called symbolic meta-execution that encodes the behaviors of all possible JIT-generated programs as a single Boogie meta-program which can be efficiently verified by SMT solvers. We evaluate Icarus by using it to re-implement components of Firefox's JavaScript JIT. We show that Icarus can scale up to expressing complex JITs, quickly detects real-world JIT bugs and verifies fixed versions, and yields C++ code that is as fast as hand-written code.
papers.abstract_zh: 即时 (JIT) 编译器通过用快速的机器代码替换缓慢的 JavaScript 解释器代码，使 JavaScript 高效运行。然而，这种效率是有代价的：JIT 编译器中的错误可以完全颠覆所有基于语言（内存）的安全保证，从而引入灾难性的可利用漏洞。我们推出了 Icarus：一个用于实现 JIT 编译器的新框架，该编译器会自动、正式地验证安全，然后可以转换为可以链接到浏览器运行时的 C++。至关重要的是，我们展示了如何使用 Icarus 构建 JIT，以便通过一种称为符号元执行的新技术，静态验证 JIT 实现，确保 JIT 在运行时生成的所有可能程序的安全性，该技术将所有可能的 JIT 生成程序的行为编码为单个 Boogie 元程序，可以通过 SMT 求解器进行有效验证。我们通过使用 Icarus 重新实现 Firefox JavaScript JIT 的组​​件来对其进行评估。我们证明，Icarus 可以扩展以表达复杂的 JIT，快速检测现实世界的 JIT 错误并验证固定版本，并生成与手写代码一样快的 C++ 代码。

papers.title: If At First You Don't Succeed, Try, Try, Again...? Insights and LLM-informed Tooling for Detecting Retry Bugs in Software Systems.
papers.abstract:
Retry---the re-execution of a task on failure---is a common mechanism to enable resilient software systems. Yet, despite its commonality and long history, retry remains difficult to implement and test.

Guided by our study of real-world retry issues, we propose a novel suite of static and dynamic techniques to detect retry problems in software. We find that the ad-hoc nature of retry implementation poses challenges for traditional program analysis but can be well suited for large language models; and that carefully repurposing existing unit tests can, along with fault injection, expose various types of retry problems.
papers.abstract_zh:
重试（失败时重新执行任务）是实现弹性软件系统的常见机制。然而，尽管重试具有普遍性和悠久的历史，但它仍然难以实施和测试。

在我们对现实世界重试问题的研究的指导下，我们提出了一套新颖的静态和动态技术来检测软件中的重试问题。我们发现重试实现的临时性质给传统程序分析带来了挑战，但非常适合大型语言模型；并且仔细地重新利用现有的单元测试可以与错误注入一起暴露各种类型的重试问题。

papers.title: Improving DNN Inference Throughput Using Practical, Per-Input Compute Adaptation.
papers.abstract: Machine learning inference platforms continue to face high request rates and strict latency constraints. Existing solutions largely focus on compressing models to substantially lower compute costs (and time) with mild accuracy degradations. This paper explores an alternate (but complementary) technique that trades off accuracy and resource costs on a perinput granularity: early exit models, which selectively allow certain inputs to exit a model from an intermediate layer. Though intuitive, early exits face fundamental deployment challenges, largely owing to the effects that exiting inputs have on batch size (and resource utilization) throughout model execution. We present E 3 , the first system that makes early exit models practical for realistic inference deployments. Our key insight is to split and replicate blocks of layers in models in a manner that maintains a constant batch size throughout execution, all the while accounting for resource requirements and communication overheads. Evaluations with NLP and vision models show that E 3 can deliver up to 1.74× improvement in goodput (for a fixed cost) or 1.78× reduction in cost (for a fixed goodput). Additionally, E 3 's goodput wins generalize to autoregressive LLMs (2.8--3.8×) and compressed models (1.67×).
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习推理平台继续面临高请求率和严格的延迟限制。现有的解决方案主要侧重于压缩模型，以大幅降低计算成本（和时间），同时精度略有下降。本文探讨了一种替代（但互补）的技术，该技术在每个输入粒度上权衡准确性和资源成本：早期退出模型，它有选择地允许某些输入从中间层退出模型。虽然直观，但早期退出面临着基本的部署挑战，这主要是由于退出输入对整个模型执行过程中的批量大小（和资源利用率）产生影响。我们推出 E 3，这是第一个使早期退出模型适用于实际推理部署的系统。我们的主要见解是以在整个执行过程中保持恒定批量大小的方式分割和复制模型中的层块，同时考虑资源需求和通信开销。 NLP 和视觉模型的评估表明，E 3 可以将有效产出提高 1.74 倍（对于固定成本）或降低 1.78 倍的成本（对于固定有效产出）。此外，E 3 的良好产出可推广到自回归 LLM (2.8--3.8×) 和压缩模型 (1.67×)。

papers.title: LazyLog: A New Shared Log Abstraction for Low-Latency Applications.
papers.abstract: Shared logs offer linearizable total order across storage shards. However, they enforce this order eagerly upon ingestion, leading to high latencies. We observe that in many modern shared-log applications, while linearizable ordering is necessary, it is not required eagerly when ingesting data but only later when data is consumed. Further, readers are naturally decoupled in time from writers in these applications. Based on this insight, we propose LazyLog, a novel shared log abstraction. LazyLog lazily binds records (across shards) to linearizable global positions and enforces this before a log position can be read. Such lazy ordering enables low ingestion latencies. Given the time decoupling, LazyLog can establish the order well before reads arrive, minimizing overhead upon reads. We build two LazyLog systems that provide linearizable total order across shards. Our experiments show that LazyLog systems deliver significantly lower latencies than conventional, eager-ordering shared logs.
papers.abstract_zh: 共享日志提供跨存储分片的线性化总顺序。然而，它们在摄取时急切地执行此命令，导致高延迟。我们观察到，在许多现代共享日志应用程序中，虽然线性化排序是必要的，但在摄取数据时并不急切需要，而是在稍后使用数据时才需要。此外，在这些应用程序中，读者自然会在时间上与作者脱钩。基于这一见解，我们提出了 LazyLog，一种新颖的共享日志抽象。 LazyLog 将记录（跨分片）延迟绑定到可线性化的全局位置，并在读取日志位置之前强制执行此操作。这种惰性排序可以降低摄取延迟。考虑到时间解耦，LazyLog 可以在读取到达之前就建立顺序，从而最大限度地减少读取时的开销。我们构建了两个 LazyLog 系统，它们提供跨分片的线性化总顺序。我们的实验表明，LazyLog 系统的延迟明显低于传统的急迫排序共享日志。

papers.title: LoongServe: Efficiently Serving Long-Context Large Language Models with Elastic Sequence Parallelism.
papers.abstract: The context window of large language models (LLMs) is rapidly increasing, leading to a huge variance in resource usage between different requests as well as between different phases of the same request. Restricted by static parallelism strategies, existing LLM serving systems cannot efficiently utilize the underlying resources to serve variable-length requests in different phases. To address this problem, we propose a new parallelism paradigm, elastic sequence parallelism (ESP), to elastically adapt to the variance across different requests and phases. Based on ESP, we design and build LoongServe, an LLM serving system that (1) improves computation efficiency by elastically adjusting the degree of parallelism in real-time, (2) improves communication efficiency by reducing key-value cache migration overhead and overlapping partial decoding communication with computation, and (3) improves GPU memory efficiency by reducing key-value cache fragmentation across instances. Our evaluation under diverse real-world datasets shows that LoongServe improves the throughput by up to 3.85× compared to chunked prefill and 5.81× compared to prefill-decoding disaggregation.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文窗口正在快速增加，导致不同请求之间以及同一请求的不同阶段之间的资源使用情况存在巨大差异。受静态并行策略的限制，现有的LLM服务系统无法高效利用底层资源来服务不同阶段的变长请求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的并行范例，即弹性序列并行（ESP），以弹性地适应不同请求和阶段之间的差异。基于 ESP，我们设计并构建了 LoongServe，一个 LLM 服务系统，它（1）通过实时弹性调整并行度来提高计算效率，（2）通过减少键值缓存迁移开销和与计算重叠的部分解码通信来提高通信效率，以及（3）通过减少跨实例的键值缓存碎片来提高 GPU 内存效率。我们在不同的真实数据集下的评估表明，与分块预填充相比，LoongServe 将吞吐量提高了 3.85 倍，与预填充解码分解相比，吞吐量提高了 5.81 倍。

papers.title: Modular Verification of Secure and Leakage-Free Systems: From Application Specification to Circuit-Level Implementation.
papers.abstract: Parfait is a framework for proving that an implementation of a hardware security module (HSM) leaks nothing more than what is mandated by an application specification. Parfait proofs cover the software and the hardware of an HSM, which catches bugs above the cycle-level digital circuit abstraction, including timing side channels. Parfait's contribution is a scalable approach to proving security and non-leakage by using intermediate levels of abstraction and relating them with transitive information-preserving refinement. This enables Parfait to use different techniques to verify the implementation at different levels of abstraction, reuse existing verified components such as CompCert, and automate parts of the proof, while still providing end-to-end guarantees. We use Parfait to verify four HSMs, including an ECDSA certificate-signing HSM and a password-hashing HSM, on top of the OpenTitan Ibex and PicoRV32 processors. Parfait provides strong guarantees for these HSMs: for instance, it proves that the ECDSA-on-Ibex HSM implementation---2,300 lines of code and 13,500 lines of Verilog---leaks nothing more than what is allowed by a 40-line specification of its behavior.
papers.abstract_zh: Parfait 是一个框架，用于证明硬件安全模块 (HSM) 的实现不会泄漏任何应用程序规范所规定的内容。 Parfait 证明涵盖了 HSM 的软件和硬件，它捕获了周期级数字电路抽象之上的错误，包括定时侧通道。 Parfait 的贡献是一种可扩展的方法，通过使用中间抽象级别并将它们与传递信息保留细化相关联来证明安全性和无泄漏。这使得 Parfait 能够使用不同的技术来验证不同抽象级别的实现，重用现有的已验证组件（例如 CompCert），并自动化部分证明，同时仍然提供端到端保证。我们使用 Parfait 来验证 OpenTitan Ibex 和 PicoRV32 处理器之上的四个 HSM，包括 ECDSA 证书签名 HSM 和密码散列 HSM。 Parfait 为这些 HSM 提供了强有力的保证：例如，它证明了 ECDSA-on-Ibex HSM 实现（2,300 行代码和 13,500 行 Verilog）不会泄露超过 40 行行为规范所允许的内容。

papers.title: Morph: Efficient File-Lifetime Redundancy Management for Cluster File Systems.
papers.abstract:
Many data services tune and change redundancy configurations of files over their lifetimes to address changes in data temperature and latency requirements. Unfortunately, changing redundancy configs ( transcode ) is IO-intensive. The Morph cluster file system introduces new transcode-efficient redundancy schemes to minimize overheads as files progress through lifetime phases.
